Description:

The company offers a multifaceted business model catering to a wide range of professionals. Wavv's revenue streams are varied, including subscriptions, value-added services, targeted advertising, and strategic partnerships.

Wavv's market strategy is rooted in innovation and inclusivity, engaging various entertainment industry segments and leveraging San Francisco's tech and creative ecosystem.

Committed to technological advancement and adaptability, Wavv ensures compliance with industry standards and remains responsive to the entertainment market's changing demands.

In summary, Wavv is a pioneering digital platform led by an industry expert, offering tools like Musica and Blackbox to empower artists and creators in the digital entertainment landscape.

Name: DataDrive2030
Description:
Join us in using data to drive change. 
At DataDrive2030, we harness data to expand access to quality early learning in South Africa - ensuring every child has early experiences that set them up for success. 

Our vision by 2030 is to provide quality early learning for all children. This means increasing the proportion of children who thrive by age five and reducing the learning gap between those from the wealthiest and poorest households.

The Thrive by Five Index
We coordinate the Thrive by Five Index, the largest study of preschool outcomes ever conducted in South Africa – led by the Department of Basic Education, with support from key sector partners.

ELOM 
When we began, South Africa lacked locally relevant, standardised tools to measure early learning outcomes. We developed the Early Learning Outcomes Measurement (ELOM) suite of tools to address this gap.
Validated and inclusive – tested with thousands of children, psychometrically standardised, and available in all 11 official languages.
Designed specifically for South Africa – accurately reflecting the country’s cultural and socio-economic diversity.
Actionable at scale – user-friendly and affordable for use across various contexts.

Data insights for action
We believe data should inspire change – equipping decision-makers, funders, principals, practitioners, NGOs, communities and caregivers - to improve outcomes for children and strengthen South Africa’s early learning system. 

We invite you to join us. 

 Follow us on LinkedIn for the latest research, policy insights and training opportunities.
 Explore the ELOM tools, data insights and useful resources at datadrive2030.co.za

Name: Chromatics AI
Description:
The Problem with AI is the Data.

Most AI models today are biased because they are trained on unfiltered, messy internet data. When you apply these general models to specific enterprise challenges, that inherent bias creates unacceptable risk and inaccuracy.

Our Proof At Chromatics AI, we tackled this head-on. We went through a rigorous, two-year, scientifically validated process specifically to solve that bias for minorities in the US. We proved that data integrity leads to model precision.

Now, we're taking this validated framework and proven process global. We don't sell generic models; we build bespoke intelligence infrastructures.

How We Do It:

Ingest & Organize: We take in your unique internal and critical external data streams, cleaning the mess to reveal a true baseline.

Reveal Custom Insights: We move beyond generic reporting to find specific, actionable intelligence hidden within your own data.

Build Actionable Workflows: We don't just hand over insights; we build the custom workflows and necessary guardrails directly into your systems to act on them.

Continuous, Isolated Training: Crucially, we continuously train your models using only your data—ensuring bias is removed, and the model evolves specifically for your organization’s needs.

By combining real-time and historical data, PLAATO enables producers to move from reactive firefighting to proactive, data-driven decision-making.

Producers use PLAATO Insights to reduce downtime, increase throughput, improve quality and consistency, optimize energy and water usage, and automate reporting and compliance — all without disrupting existing operations or replacing current control systems.

PLAATO is trusted by 400+ producers worldwide, supporting a wide range of batch-based operations including breweries, distilleries, wineries, RTD and functional beverage producers, and other liquids manufacturers. We partner closely with our customers to start small, prove value quickly, and scale across sites, teams, and processes.

You can learn more about our total facility product, PLAATO Insights, or our fermentation focused one, Smart Fermentation, on our website: www.plaato.ai. Or simply reach out to our team via hello@plaato.io for more materials as well as costings, for free.

Plus, you can get our brochure: The Ultimate Guide To Unlocking Your Production Data With AI via our website.

PLAATO | Industrial AI for smarter batch-based liquids production.

Name: TREALIS
Description:
Depuis 2013, TREALIS contribue auprès des gestionnaires d’infrastructure, en particulier de SNCF Réseau, à moderniser et fiabiliser le réseau ferroviaire pour répondre à la demande croissante de mobilité et aux enjeux de la transition écologique.
 
Nous fournissons aux gestionnaires d'infrastructure ferroviaire des informations sur l'état du réseau ainsi que des solutions d'analyse intégrée.
 
Grâce à nos trains équipés de systèmes de mesures de haute technologie, nous collectons diverses données (géométrie de la voie, rails, caténaires, signalisation...) pour la surveillance et la maintenance des infrastructures ferroviaires.
 
Nous développons :
 
De nouveaux moyens de mesure : de l’intégration de nouveaux systèmes à la conception et construction de nouveaux trains de mesures ;
Des activités de post traitement et d’aide à l’exploitation des données ;
Des services d’analyse et d’accessibilité des données grâce à une expertise variée qui va de l’IA au développement web en passant par notre connaissance des métiers de l’infrastructure.
 
Notre expertise concourt activement à la sécurité du Réseau ferroviaire, à l’amélioration de la fiabilité des installations, à une meilleure connaissance de l’évolution de l’état du réseau et à l’optimisation des coûts de cycle de vie des composants de l’infrastructure.

* Empowering Africa’s Digital Future *

We envision a future where technology fuels progress, enhances lives, and fosters sustainable growth in every sector.

* Our Vision

We aim to empower Africa's digital future through data-driven innovation, inclusivity, and technological advancement. By harnessing the potential of data, we seek to transform industries and improve the quality of life for communities across the continent.

* Our Products and Services

DataVerse Africa offers a comprehensive suite of products and services designed to meet the diverse needs of businesses and organizations:

Our trainings and courses are tailored to equip participants with the necessary skills to thrive in a data-driven world.

- Community Engagement: At DataVerse Africa, we believe in the power of collaboration. Our platform connects tech enthusiasts, developers, and innovators across the continent. We host hackathons, workshops, and networking events that foster knowledge sharing and collaboration on projects that drive innovation.

- Consulting Services: Our team of experts provides consulting services to help organizations develop data strategies that align with their business goals. We work closely with clients to identify opportunities for leveraging data to enhance performance and sustainable growth.

Name: Eurailscout France
Description:
Depuis 2013, Eurailscout France œuvre à rendre le transport ferroviaire plus sûr, plus fiable et plus disponible.

Nous accompagnons les gestionnaires d’infrastructures ferroviaires en leur fournissant des informations précises sur l’état du réseau ainsi que des solutions d’analyse intégrée et de visualisation des données.

Grâce à nos trains équipés de systèmes de mesure, nous collectons une large variété de données (géométrie de la voie, défauts sur les éclisses ou boulons, fissurations, surveillance des caténaires, signalisation…) pour la surveillance et la maintenance des infrastructures.

Notre valeur ajoutée réside dans notre capacité à proposer des services complets allant de la collecte des données jusqu’à l’analyse et l’aide à la décision pour le mainteneur afin d’œuvrer pour une maintenance plus agile, plus prédictive et de plus en plus efficace.

Ainsi, nous développons :
de nouveaux moyens de mesure, allant de l’intégration de capteurs à la conception complète de trains de mesure,
des services de post-traitement et de gestion de la donnée,
des solutions d’analyse avancée et d’accessibilité, grâce à une expertise combinant intelligence artificielle, développement logiciel et connaissance métier.

Nous proposons également, en partenariat avec ERDMANN Software, la solution IRISSYS, un outil intégré d’exploitation et d’analyse des données d’infrastructures linéaires, destiné aux gestionnaires en environnement francophone.

Notre expertise concourt activement à la sécurité du Réseau Ferroviaire, à l’amélioration de la fiabilité des installations, à une meilleure compréhension de l’évolution du réseau et à l’optimisation des coûts de cycle de vie des composants de l’infrastructure.

Avec plus de 80 collaborateurs internes et prestataires, Eurailscout France poursuit son développement pour rester un acteur stratégique de la surveillance des infrastructures ferroviaires.

Description:
Arrivalist is the leading location intelligence platform in the travel industry. We use mobile location datasets to provide actionable insights on consumer behavior, competitive share, media effectiveness, and market trends. Over 200 travel marketers, including 100 cities, 40 US States, and 4 of the top 10 US Theme Parks, use these insights to inform media strategy, operations, and destination development. 

OUR PRODUCTS
Destination marketers and tourism pros can now unlock trip insights, campaign attribution, traveler movement, and short-term rental insights & hotel trends – all under one roof. Access our self-service portals 24/7/365 and tap into data intelligence to help drive business decisions.

1.) TRIP INSIGHTS: See the complete picture of movement to and through your destination. Our interactive portal shows you where your visitors come from, when they arrive, and how long they stay.

2.) CAMPAIGN ATTRIBUTION: Show what degree visitors who were exposed to media are more likely to arrive, which channels moved the needle for visitation, and if those exposed to advertising stayed longer.

3.) LODGING OVERVIEW: Measure the total overnight economy (hotel stays, vacation rentals, and visiting friends and family), and use the insights to focus on visitors staying in paid accommodations.

4.) SHORT-TERM RENTAL TRENDS: Industry-leading reports allow tourism pros to easily uncover how short-term rentals are changing their travel landscape.

ACQUISITION
In 2023, Arrivalist was acquired by AirDNA, a leading short-term rental data provider. AirDNA and Arrivalist sit within predictis, a family of leading software-enabled data businesses that is a portfolio company of Alpine Investors. The acquisition unites two highly talented teams of data scientists, data engineers, and account managers with deep industry expertise. The integration will propel the development of state-of-the-art solutions that meet the evolving needs of the industry.

InfrasAI helps insurance carriers go from requirements to Partner-ready workflows in a blink. Easy to build, reuse, maintain, and modify with Natural Language.

Our Agentic AI ingests raw requirements in any format (Excel, PDF tags, ACORD models, XML), auto-builds headless workflows, and exposes a single SDK your 3rd party Partners can easily plug into in only 15-lines of code —no custom rebuilds for each channel.

With abstraction at the core, every partner sees the same clean data model, so QA and rework drop dramatically while time-to-market accelerates. Business teams can update rules in natural language, preview impacts, and redeploy in minutes—freeing IT from endless one-off projects and letting you scale distribution faster at lower cost.

The access to end consumers is facilitated through our current strategy of direct relationships with retailers, CPG brands, food service providers, and distributors.

Farmer Empowerment: in the form of increased market-channel optionality, higher prices, better margins, faster payments, efficient aggregation, and greater consistency, professionalism and security through the digitization of contracts, transactions and purchase agreements. 

Regeneration: in the form of validation of environmental impacts, claims and practices, and the streamlined digital storytelling from producer to consumer to build trust, and to create a framework and marketplace around economic incentives for impactful practices. 

Transparency: in the form of scaled visibility of producers, products and product ingredient sources and their validated impact on workers, community, consumers and the ecosystem.

Core Offerings:

Bootcamp-style, Intensive Courses: Focused on practical application, with limited theory and extensive hands-on exercises.
Modular curriculum: Choose individual courses or bundle them into learning pathways customized to your needs.
Real-world case studies: Apply newly acquired skills to solve actual data challenges faced by diverse industries.
Industry-experienced instructors: Learn from practitioners who have walked the data path and deliver real-world insights.
Small class sizes: Personalized attention and ample opportunity for individualized feedback and guidance.
Career support: Resume workshops, mock interviews, and career mentoring to help you land your dream data role.

Featured Courses:

Power BI: Master data visualization and dashboards, unlocking rich insights for informed decision-making.
SQL: Uncover the secrets of structured data, writing efficient queries to extract and manipulate critical information.

R for Statistics: Dive deep into statistical modeling and analysis, using R's robust capabilities for advanced research.
SPSS for Survey Analysis: Extract valuable insights from survey data, using SPSS's comprehensive statistical tools.

Name: Telraam
Description:
Traffic data for better streets. Get high quality, continuous, multimodal and real-time data, in collaboration with local citizens.

[ENG] Telraam is a qualified and objective citizen science service provider enabling local authorities, companies, science agencies to generate traffic counting data using a AI sensor and open-source software. 
We maintain and develop the Telraam-sensor and platform where all data is published as open data.

Telraam is the brainchild of Transport & Mobility Leuven a Belgian transport policy research company, Mobiel 21, an NGO with focus on citizen engagement and Waanz.in, a digital studio. 
The original project started in 2019 as a collaboration between the above mentioned partners. As of January 2021, the development and maintenance of Telraam is managed by a new joint venture: Rear Window BV.

[NL] Telraam is een gekwalificeerde en objectieve dienstverlener die burgers, bedrijven, organisaties en lokale overheden in staat stelt om multimodaal verkeer te tellen met behulp van een AI-sensor en open-source software. 
Wij onderhouden en (door)ontwikkelen de Telraam-verkeersteller en het platform waarop alle gegevens als open data worden gepubliceerd.

Telraam is het geesteskind van Transport & Mobility Leuven (TML), een Belgisch onderzoeksbureau voor verkeers- en transportbeleid, Mobiel 21 (M21), een NGO met focus op burgerbetrokkenheid en Waanz.in, een digitale studio. 
Het oorspronkelijke project startte in 2019 als een samenwerking tussen TML, M21 en Waanz.in. Vanaf januari 2021 wordt de ontwikkeling en het onderhoud van Telraam beheerd door een nieuwe joint venture: Rear Window BV.

#verkeerstellingen #trafficcounts #multimodal #citizenscience #opendata #ai
#mobilitypolicy #mobiliteitsbeleid #verkeersmodel #verkeerstelling #trafficmodel #trafficscout

Description:
Pentation Analytics is a pioneer in Agentic AI, focused on transforming enterprise operations by embedding intelligence across key organizational roles and workflows. Our AI agents are designed to drive efficiency, automate decisions, and enhance visibility across functions.

Flagship Product: Newton for Supply Chain
Newton is our flagship agentic AI platform designed for the supply chain. It empowers planning, procurement, and operations teams with two intelligent assistants:

Nick – Your smart supply chain planner and sales operations assistant. Nick analyzes historical and real-time data to forecast demand for upcoming weeks, months, or quarters. He then checks inventory alignment with demand and autonomously triggers the appropriate fulfillment process—whether it's a stock transfer between warehouses or raising a purchase requisition (PR) when external supply is needed.

Nora – Your intelligent procurement assistant. Once a PR is approved, Nora steps in to manage supplier engagement. If there's a predefined vendor with agreed pricing, she automatically issues the PO. If not, she surfaces detailed vendor intelligence—price history, quality scores, ratings, share of wallet, and more—so the procurement manager can make informed decisions. She then issues the PO and tracks supplier deliveries while keeping all stakeholders informed.

Together, Nick and Nora act as intelligent coworkers—always alert, analytical, and action-oriented.

Beyond Supply Chain: Domain-Specific Agents
Beyond supply chain, Pentation Analytics has developed intelligent assistants for other roles such as:

Legal – An intelligent assistant for lawyers

Research – An assistant for scientists and R&D professionals.

Vision Forward
We believe every function in an enterprise can be empowered with AI-driven intelligence. At Pentation, we’re building the future of work—one agent at a time.

Our Approach:  

We follow a disciplined, outcome-driven process that keeps privacy and explainability front and center: 

Data Discovery & Business KPIs: Understand data objectives, incumbent workflows, and define success metrics. 

Exploratory Data Analysis: Uncover patterns and trends in structured or unstructured datasets to help guide future analytics studies. 

Data Architecture and Engineering: Design ingestion flows, define data systems and integrations, ETL operations and secure storage. 

Data Modeling: Build structured datasets and prepare clean models for analysis. 

Data Visualization: Create intuitive and real-time dashboards for performance tracking and higher visibility. 

Governance & Privacy-First Practices: Documented lineage, access controls, compliance delivery. 

Prediction & AI: Develop forecasting, predictive models, agentic AI, and ML models for smarter decisions and deeper insights 

Monitor & Iterate: Maintain data stack, measure impact, track drift, and refine for continuous value addition. 

What We Offer: 

Performance & Marketing Analytics: Campaign measurement, attribution, forecasting, audience analysis.

Logistics Analytics: Route optimization, shipment tracking, inventory management, and cost control.

If you want analytics that become part of how decisions are made, not just dashboards that look nice, we should collaborate!

Name: FibreTrace
Description:
FibreTrace is a revolutionary textile verification technology that combines physical tracers with real-time digital monitoring. Our patented luminescent pigment is embedded within fibers during the manufacturing process, creating a unique, scannable identifier that stays with the material throughout its entire journey. Using our specialized scanning technology, this pigment can be detected and verified at any point in the supply chain, providing immediate, reliable confirmation of fiber authenticity and origin.
FibreTrace provides brands and retailers with true custody of supply, the ability to quantify and audit fibre content, and access primary impact data for natural and man-made solutions. Through powerful storytelling, FibreTrace empowers global supply chains.

Name: Zingle AI Lab
Description:
Data pipelines break.
Dashboards drift.
Warehouse costs explode.
And every data engineer still merges code thinking, “it runs, so it’s fine.”

We fix that.

We’re building an AI code reviewer made for data engineers - one that deeply understands SQL, dbt, Spark, Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, and Airflow.

Before any change goes live, it reviews your code for:

Cost impact - how much it will actually cost in production.

Performance - whether it follows best practices for joins, materializations, and incremental loads.

Data quality - catching missing or redundant tests, enforcing business logic, and preventing future incidents.

Downstream impact - showing what dashboards, models, or metrics will be affected.

With every review, it makes your data team smarter - forcing every engineer to think about cost, performance, and reliability before merging.

Over time, it turns your tribal practices into automated standards - so your company runs like the world’s best data team.

Ship with confidence. Spend wisely. Never break downstream again.

Name: SQL Developer
Description:
The SQL Developer Community is a global network of developers who are passionate about the SQL programming language. SQL (Structured Query Language) is a powerful and versatile programming language that can be used to query and manage data in relational databases.

SQL is one of the most popular programming languages in the world, and it is used by millions of developers to build a wide range of applications, including websites, mobile apps, and enterprise systems.

Our community is made up of people from all backgrounds, with a wide range of expertise. We have SQL developers, data scientists, database administrators, and more. We also come from a variety of sectors, including startups, enterprises, and academia.

We are united by our belief that SQL is a powerful and important tool for data-driven organizations. We believe that SQL can help businesses to make better decisions, improve their efficiency, and innovate faster.

Our mission

Our mission is to:

Promote the development and adoption of SQL technologies
Support the growth of the SQL community
Educate and inspire SQL developers
Advocate for diversity and inclusion in the SQL community
Our activities

We host a variety of events, including conferences, meetups, and workshops. We also publish a newsletter and maintain a website with resources for SQL developers.

We are also involved in a number of initiatives to support the growth of the SQL community, such as:

Providing mentorship to new SQL developers
Organizing SQL hackathons and coding challenges
Supporting the development of SQL open-source projects
Advocating for policies that support the growth of the SQL community

Name: Apache XTable (Incubating)
Description:
Apache XTable (Incubating) is a cross-table omni-directional interop of lakehouse table formats Apache Hudi, Apache Iceberg, and Delta Lake. XTable is formerly known as and recently renamed from OneTable. XTable is NOT a new or separate format, XTable provides abstractions and tools for the translation of lakehouse table format metadata. 

Choosing a table formats is a costly evaluation. Each project has rich features that may fit different use-cases. Some vendors use a table format as a point of lock-in. Your data should be UNIVERSAL!

https://github.com/apache/incubator-xtable

Name: HyLight (YC S23)
Description:
L'ambition d'HyLight est de rendre nos sociétés résilientes face aux effets du changement climatique en travaillant sur l'étape cruciale d'observation et d'inspection pour une meilleure compréhension de notre monde.

HyLight développe une solution pour inspecter facilement de grandes étendues. Nos drones dirigeables sont capables de collecter des données variées sur des centaines de kilomètres sans émettre de gaz à effet de serre.

Nos activités sont :

- La détection des fuites de méthane sur les infrastructures gazières (4 % des émissions globales de GES).
- L'inspection de lignes électriques pour prévenir les pannes et feux de forêts.

Nous avons pour objectif d'inspecter plus d'5 millions de kilomètres d'infrastructures énergétiques européennes par an d'ici 2030.

En 1 an, nous avons :

- Développé 6 itérations de nos drones dirigeables.
- Volé plus de 150 heures.
- Sécurisé nos premiers contrats d'inspections avec les plus gros opérateurs d'infrastructures énergétiques en Europe.
- Intégré le meilleur programme d'accélération du monde, Y Combinator.

Nous basons notre solution sur l'efficience opérationnelle. Cette efficience se reflète dans notre équipe motivée et passionnée de porter au quotidien ce projet à réel impact sociétal. Nous travaillons ensemble en partageant des valeurs communes :
- Toujours agir.

You're correlating data, finding those multiplication errors that shouldn't exist, catching problems before someone has to report them. -	Accelerated learning in an in-demand sector
-	Employability training
-	Networking
-	Access to jobs with placement employer
-	Accreditation

For employers:
-	Access to young talent
-	No recruitment costs

-	High ROI

The Fast Track Talent Academy is funded through the Cardiff Capital Region, in association with Cardiff & Vale College.

Please Note: We are funded to upskill talent in Wales, and as such we cannot accept applications from applicants who already have a Level 5 or Level 7 in the specified area of study. However, we will consider each application on its own merits and on a case-by-case basis.

ODEON Kino

Norway

Why in February… on a Thursday?

What We Do

HanPrism
HanPrism, a high-performing plant information system, displays equipment data quickly and easily without distortion. It accurately collects, stores, and analyzes vast amounts of real-time and historical plant operation data. It allows you to access plant data anytime and anywhere and provides visualization tools for additional analysis. With HanPrism, you can collaborate at an organization-wide level with the right information at the right time and make strategic, data-informed decisions.

HanPHI
HanPHI, a predictive analytics solution, warns you of potential failures that can develop into catastrophic failures by comparing real-time data with expected data. Machine learning models calculate expected values based on past normal plant operation data and correlated equipment data. HanPHI provides condition-based early warnings to prevent functional failures by identifying plant sensor abnormalities, equipment degradations, and irregular operational conditions.

At Google Labs, bold ideas move from concept to prototype—often long before they reach mainstream products. Experiments span generative AI, multimodal search, developer tools, creative expression, virtual experiences, and intelligent assistants powered by Google’s most advanced models, including Gemini.

The platform enables users to experience what’s next: conversational AI in Search, creative tools like MusicFX and TextFX, research assistants such as NotebookLM, virtual try-on and visualization experiments like Doppl, and interactive AI experiences including Portraits and Opal. Each experiment is designed to gather real-world feedback, ensuring responsible development, usability, and impact at scale.

Google Labs emphasizes transparency, accessibility, and learning. Many experiments are opt-in via Search Labs, allowing users to actively shape the evolution of Google products through feedback and exploration. This iterative approach helps transform experimental ideas into reliable, scalable technologies used by billions worldwide.

More than a product showcase, Google Labs represents Google’s long-term commitment to responsible AI, creativity, and human-centered design—bridging research, engineering, and real-world application.

Explore. Experiment. Shape the future.

The collected data is cleaned, validated, stored in a modeled SQL database, processed, analyzed, restored and presented in the form of meaningful significant outputs, including: reports, online dashboards and decision support tools.

Our algorithm-based decision support solutions are focused on ensuring quality and safety, and reducing expenses, through anomaly detection, early fault prediction and operational optimization algorithms.

iShed - is an algorithm-based solution for water quality monitoring and water security in rivers and watersheds. iShed has been co-developed by IOSight and Mekorot, Israel’s national water company, and provides reliable pollution detection and speed of propagation calculation in watersheds. iShed algorithm eliminates 95% of false alarms.

They have agreed to ensure their data centres are climate neutral by 2030 and set ambitious measurable targets for 2025 and 2030 in the following five core concepts:

● Energy efficiency
● Renewable energy
● Water conservation
● Circular economy
● Heat recycling

Progress towards achieving climate-neutral data centres will be monitored by the European Commission twice a year.

Pact Mission: 
The Climate Neutral Data Centre Pact promotes and advances the sustainability of cloud computing, data centres, and the technology necessary to support a climate-neutral digital future.

Name: Data Community Togo
Description:
DaCoT (Data Community of Togo) a vu le jour pour combler un vide dans la représentativité des professionnels de la data dans l'espace public togolais, et d'une volonté forte de mettre en avant les métiers de la data sous toutes leurs formes.

Regroupant des Data Analysts, Data Scientists, Data Engineers et métiers connexes, DaCoT s’est fixé comme objectif de participer à l'établissement d'une culture data au sein des entités publiques et privées au Togo, de promouvoir une meilleure connaissance et une valorisation des métiers de la data, et d'inspirer les jeunes générations à s’intéresser à ces carrières d’avenir.

À travers des ateliers, webinaires, conférences, datathons et autres initiatives, DaCoT s'engage activement à contribuer à la transformation économique du Togo et à devenir un acteur clé de sa transition numérique.

Notre mission ultime est d’établir un écosystème data dynamique, inclusif et innovant au Togo, en favorisant la montée en compétences des passionné(e)s de la data, de la finance à la santé, en passant par le secteur public, le commerce, la logistique, l'agriculture et bien d’autres domaines stratégiques.

Chez DaCoT, nous croyons fermement que la donnée est un levier de progrès. En rassemblant les talents, en partageant les savoirs et en stimulant l'innovation, nous œuvrons pour un Togo où la donnée devient une ressource stratégique au service du développement économique, social et technologique.

Name: Chief Data and Analytical Officers Network
Description:
WHO WE ARE: A growing number of organisations are appointing Chief Data & Analytical Officers (CDAOs) at executive and board level role, dedicated to unlocking the potential of the data an organisation already holds. A good CDAO will provide leadership and support to a team who can harness this potential.

OUR NEEDS: A successful CDAO will need to be able to lead and be visible to generate a data-rich and curious culture within an organisation. You need to champion the benefits of analytics and inspire all staff on the journey with you. It’s crucial that everyone uses data responsibly in any organisation, and the CDAO is there to ensure that happens.

WHY TO JOIN: A CDAO needs to have lived and breathed the role of an analyst. We encourage professional registration via industry bodies such as FEDIP and AphA. This shows not only that your skills have been validated and independently assessed, but that you are passionate and committed to the analyst profession. As early adopters of professional registration, you are clearly willing to be held accountable to AphA values and our code of conduct.

BENEFITS: You will be the visible leader of analysts and will foster an environment that hones analysts’ skills and their confidence to use them. You will create a safe space for analysts to learn and grow: an organisation that’s ready to embrace data. You will encourage analysts to network nationally and support them in undertaking training and development by providing both the time and funding to do so.

To find out and to get involved please contact tetiana@aphanalysts.org. To join  please fill out the form https://us16.list-manage.com/contact-form?u=d6e82821d054975fd69b34c74&form_id=1e81d4130e9a668c3bb93c2e815ecf82.

Name: Vault
Description:
Welcome to the future of customer understanding, where data impacts communities—not just promotions.

At Vault, we’re obsessed about three things: rethinking how data and AI can be more transparent and rewarding for customers, unlocking the untapped data potential in retail, and removing the typical data access hurdles that slow down progress. 

In an industry moving to hybrid customer experiences and more focus on brand community, retailers often miss the full picture of their customers.  Fragmented data sources, siloed strategies, and outdated first, second, and third-party insights rarely produce behavioural depth or true lifestyle activity, beyond inference. Not to mention, the time it takes to get into the right hands.  

Our Founders asked, "What if there was a better way?" Action speak louder than words, right? 

We believe in putting customers at the center. Our platform enables live-streamed, voluntary data sharing—geo-location, browsing behavior, and transactional insights. In return, we fairly reward customers and shine a light on how data is used with useful reports and tools. This creates an open and transparent, trust-driven relationship that builds meaningful and engaged brand communities ready to help you understand them better.

By simplifying data collection, aggregating multiple data types into one easy-to-use platform, and eliminating complex, costly engineering solutions. brands can reduce data outlay whilst accessing zero-party insights in a platform built to answer the most complex of customer curiosities. 

With Vault, you can react instantly to consumer behavior, harness the understanding of your top customer habits and behaviours, and deliver personalised, timely experiences that truly connect. Welcome to the future of retail, where data drives communities—not just promotions.

#DataCommunity #ZeroPartyData #CustomerInsights #DataForRetail #DataTransparency

Description:
DarkPulse, is built from a dedicated, highly skilled group of professionals ready to revolutionize the Fiber Sensor Industry.

Our technology's unique features are only found in a Genuine DarkPulse Solution. Other Brillouin based sensors suffer from a temperature and strain cross-sensitivity as well as decreased sensitivity due to the nature of laser sensing itself. Versus other fibre optic sensing systems, DarkPulse possesses the capability of independently measuring strain and temperature at all points along a single length of optical fibre. 
With DarkPulse, a resolution increase 200 times gained over conventional fiber sensors. No insitu sensors utilized - eliminating "cold" spots.

Versatility...  Less power required, higher accuracy and expanded spatial resolution up to 200 times higher than traditional sensors, off-network capable,  multiple power options including solar, available with 24/7 Technical Support Staff monitoring, lower aquisition costs, lower operating costs and a capability to monitor the system remotely - saving organizations hundreds of thousands of dollars per year in human resources.

Consider the applications of a fiber sensor system that costs one- third that of any other system  yet allows for 8x's the sensing capablitiy, 200 times the resolution and one tenth the power requirements of any competitor in the market!

Name: Fabric User Group Nigeria
Description:
Community code of conduct: 

Be friendly and welcoming

Listen with purpose and create space for others’ communication preferences.

Ask yourself how you can make someone's life easier.
Be patient

Remember that people have varying communication styles and preferences.

Recognize that not everyone is using their native language. Meaning and tone can be lost in translation.

Be thoughtful

Think about how others will interpret your words. Aim for clear and productive communication.

Remember that sometimes it is best to refrain from commenting.

Be respectful and inclusive

Respect differences of opinion.

Seek to understand and build bridges, not condemn or criticize.

Make a conscious effort to include people who differ from you.
Be open and curious

Assume good intent and interpret others’ statements or questions in good faith.

Ask questions to understand, not denounce.

Focus on continuous learning. Improve upon the things you already know, tackle new things, and ask others about their expertise to deepen your own knowledge.

Name: AI Vulnerability Database
Description:
The AI Vulnerability Database (AVID) is an open-source knowledge base of failure modes for large-scale AI/ML models and datasets. There are two parts AVID: a taxonomy and a database. These efforts are complimentary to each other in enabling data scientists and ML engineers proactively screen their ML systems for potential harms in an efficient manner.

AVID is the flagship project of AI Risk and Vulnerability Alliance, a US 501(c)(3) nonprofit.

Name: Erium GmbH
Description:
Die Erium GmbH ermöglicht mit ihrer Enterprise Plattform Halerium Unternehmen, die Komplexität ihrer Geschäftsprozesse intuitiv zu meistern. Mit der Verwendung von generativer Künstlicher Intelligenz (KI) können Aufgaben besser verstanden, effizient gelöst und nachhaltig automatisiert werden.

In vielen Unternehmen bleibt KI oft ungenutzt, da sie als zu komplex, unzugänglich und unsicher erscheint. Halerium ändert das und macht Innovationen und Effizienzsteigerungen zugänglich und sicher. Dies hilft bei der Beschleunigung des Unternehmenswachstums und der Optimierung des Business.

Mit Halerium erhalten Unternehmen einen klaren und umfassen Überblick über ihre Aufgaben und Prozesse. Diese können modelliert und analysiert werden, um zu identifizieren, welche Prozesse durch generative KI optimiert und skaliert werden können. 

Darüber hinaus unterstützt Halerium Unternehmen dabei, die größten Verbesserungspotenziale zu erkennen und zu realisieren. Mittels generativer KI können Informationen effizient verarbeitet, Texte und Code generiert und fundierte Schlussfolgerungen gezogen werden. 

Halerium ermöglicht auch die Automatisierung von wiederkehrenden Aufgaben durch die Erstellung von Prozess-Pipelines für bewährte Prozessschritte. Es bietet zudem leistungsstarke Bots und aktuellste Werkzeuge für den Umgang mit Daten und KI. 

Gründer und Geschäftsführer sind Dr. Theo Steininger und Dr. Maksim Greiner.

Name: FAIRmat
Description:
FAIRmat is creating a federated data infrastructure for data from the field of condensed-matter physics and the chemical physics of solids. Our aim is to make materials data Findable, Accessible, Interoperable and Re-purposable (FAIR).
FAIRmat integrates data obtained from all areas of materials science: synthesis, experimental characterization, theory & computations, and various applications. We operate the NOMAD Laboratory, which offers cutting-edge tools for collecting, storing, presenting, and analyzing materials-science data.
Our approach is centered around our users, and we reach out to the scientific community at all stages of development to ensure that our infrastructure meets their needs. We also offer a variety of workshops, tutorials and training materials aimed at researchers in all stages of their careers.
FAIRmat is funded as a consortium of the German Research-Data Infrastructure NFDI and represents a broad community of researchers from universities and other leading institutions in Germany.

Name: MEAZON
Description:
Meazon materializing its core values - Measure | Monitor | Manage - is a global innovator in energy data acquisition technology. Our pioneering technology has been recognized as the only winner of US Department of Energy’s wireless submetering challenge. We enable energy digitization by providing game-changing energy submeters & controllers connected to the cloud, supporting services such as energy efficiency, preventive maintenance, demand-response and distributed energy resources planning in low voltage networks. We are pioneers in using NB-IoT and LTE cat M in communicating energy data to the cloud and implementing street lights management with own designed NEMA controllers. 

Meazon’s ambition is to disrupt the closed and monolithic energy monitoring & control market by bringing a “measure as a service” offering that can be leveraged by enterprises and utilities and consolidate actionable energy data using open interfaces. It addresses the global energy market such as: utilities & DSOs, microgrids, enterprises, buildings and smart cities.   It supports the integration to the grid of technologies such as EVs and provides actionable energy data for energy efficiency investments in enterprises, buildings and even homes. 

US Department of Energy (DOE) has recognized (March 2017) Meazon as the only winner of their energy submeter challenge. The objective of this challenge was the design of a uniquely small, wireless, self-sustained and low cost IoT energy submeter for the US energy efficiency industry.

Companies that have their own software, or that are dedicated to creating applications for third parties, usually face the problem of having to offer their users relevant insights and data visualisations on top of their software. Users are able to receive extra cashback when making purchases via DDW at numerous partner stores or brands. Additionally, they have the convenience of adding extra funds to their DDW by topping it up using their credit/debit/prepaid cards or any other digital wallets provided by banks or telecom companies.

DISCO is designed to drive cost savings by providing access to buy products that align with each user's personal preferences, offering the most competitive prices in the market. Additionally, DISCO empowers users with tools to properly manage their personal budgets and track their expenses for a better understanding of their  financial management.

Leveraging its robust first-party alternative to anonymized data, DISCO presents a distinctive behavioral scoring system and KYC for banks and financial institutions. Moreover, it extends invaluable insights to brands, merchants, and shopping malls, enhancing their understanding of their customer base and optimizing customer acquisition strategies. DISCO also offer white label for loyalty programs and SaaS through an agile workflow to implement a data-driven culture.

DISCO smart interactive dashboard provides decision-makers with a comprehensive view of their business's market shares, product performance, and efficient allocation of marketing budgets.

DISCO is the only Arab/African platform has the capability of calculating individual carbon footprints by interpreting purchase receipts and utility bills.

Name: PED - Preparatório para Entrevistas em Dados
Description:
O PED é a mentoria em grupo que vai ajudar você a se preparar para conseguir a tão sonhada vaga em dados

Por aqui você vai encontrar muita teoria e muita prática para você:
1. Gerar um portfólio de destaque
2. Estudar para se tornar analista de dados ou cientista de dados
3. Estar 100% preparado para entrevistas técnicas e de soft skills
4. Colocar a mão na massa com exercícios práticos e desafios
5. Tirar suas dúvidas com Renata Biaggi e Daniele Santiago
6. Possibilidade de fazer simulações de entrevistas
7. Fazer networking com a comunidade, receber vagas, etc

Todo o conteúdo é dividido em trilhas de estudos. Veja aqui algumas trilhas que temos:

1. Trilha de Linkedin/CV, soft skills e entrevistas não técnicas
2. Simulação de entrevistas (gravações)
simulações!
3. Lógica, raciocínio analítico e matemática básica
4. Estatística
5. Python
6. SQL
7. Machine Learning
8. MLOps
9. Git e github
10. Cases
11. Portfólio dos sonhos
12. Workshops com diversos convidados de renome da área

Todas as trilhas contém material escrito muito detalhado e rico, exercícios práticos e teóricos e, algumas trilhas também possuem vídeo-aulas

Vem para o PED!
https://www.renatabiaggi.com/ped

Formerly the largest and most trusted data, polling, and predictive analytics firm in Republican politics.

WPAi served as a strategic partner to presidential campaigns, governors, U.S. Senators, Members of Congress, national committees, and advocacy groups—building some of the most sophisticated targeting operations in the country. The firm’s work helped elect leaders in dozens of states and reshaped how the right leverages data to persuade, mobilize, and govern.

WPAi gained national recognition for its role in Ted Cruz’s 2016 presidential campaign, where Chris Wilson led Research and Analytics. The firm’s integration of polling, modeling, and field strategy became the gold standard for data-driven campaigns, influencing countless others that followed.

By its peak, WPAi had grown into a multimillion-dollar enterprise, recognized as an industry leader in accurate polling, message optimization, voter modeling, and strategic consulting.

The firm’s legacy lives on through its alumni and through next-generation platforms like EyesOver, which brings real-time sentiment analysis to political and corporate strategy, and Stratus Intelligence, a high-impact advisory group focused on insight-driven execution.

We believe climate change is a data problem!

Our Vision: We strive to make emissions data accessible and transparent for both producers and consumers—enabling effective action towards positive environmental change and transforming how the world views and manages GHG emissions.

Our Mission: We are committed to equipping users with smart, intuitive technology that brings unparalleled clarity to product emissions data, turning insights into actionable solutions for a greener future.

The Challenge: The global food system accounts for 34% of all GHG emissions, yet a lack of sophisticated, accessible GHG accounting frameworks prevents meaningful progress. Companies often rely on expensive consultancies, making emissions tracking opaque and inaccessible to many.

Our Solution: CarbonTag bridges the gap between sustainability attitudes and actions by establishing transparency, accessibility, and precision in GHG accounting. Our innovative tool and extensive database take a bottom-up approach, setting new standards for accuracy and traceability. With our fully automated system, we can calculate the GHG emissions of any food product in seconds—revolutionizing carbon footprinting at scale.

• Build a full picture of commuting: set up locations and upload employee data, or start with statistically estimated employee locations for quick insights with limited data.

Name: UrClimate
Description:
UrClimate is a SaaS product developed by Alkazar Engineering, a multidisciplinary company specialized in climate risk modeling, meteorological analytics, and engineering consulting.

Headquartered in Istanbul, Türkiye, Alkazar provides science-based decision-support solutions for banks, insurers, energy firms, and infrastructure investors worldwide — with a strong emphasis on physical climate risk quantification.

UrClimate helps organizations quantify and manage climate-related risks across any location globally, by calculating metrics such as:

• Expected Annual Loss (EAL) for floods, storms, heatwaves, wildfires, and droughts
• Risk scores based on RCP and SSP climate scenarios (2020–2100)
• Financial impact modeling aligned with TCFD, TSRS, and EU Taxonomy frameworks

Built on robust climate data sources like ERA5, CORDEX, ICON-EU, Open-Meteo, and refined with engineering-based damage curves, UrClimate delivers high-resolution risk intelligence through:

– API access (JSON outputs)
– Interactive web dashboards
– Excel-based custom reports

Our platform is already used by forward-looking organizations such as Aydem, GalataWind, Sanko Enerji, and several Turkish and European financial institutions.

Backed by a team of meteorologists, engineers, and data scientists, Alkazar has been delivering climate and environmental insights since 2016 — and UrClimate is the next evolution of this mission:

“Global-scale climate risk modeling — local-scale actionable insight.”

We serve clients worldwide — whether you operate in Türkiye, the UK, Southeast Asia, or MENA — we deliver climate risk outputs in minutes, not months.

Name: Horizon Europe DIVINE Project
Description:
DIVINE: "DemonstratIng Value of agri data sharIng for boostiNg data Economy in agriculture"

Harnessing the power of a data economy in agriculture would prove beneficial for the industry. But the potential of such an economy has yet to be explored, despite modern management and agricultural practices generating more data than ever before. Various factors are keeping a fully functional data economy from emerging, including technical interoperability, market transparency and data ownership issues. The EU-funded DIVINE project aims to show the cost benefits and added value of sharing agri-data. To do this, it will develop an agri-data ecosystem that combines data already commonly shared while also using industry-led pilots that are devised on data-sharing plans. The results would support policy makers, technology providers, farm representatives and other agri-data stakeholders.

Name: G.V() - Graph Database Client & Visualization Tooling
Description:
G.V() is a graph database client & visualization tool for property graph databases.
It is compatible with Amazon Neptune, Neo4j, Memgraph, Google Cloud Spanner Graph, Azure Cosmos DB’s Gremlin API, JanusGraph, Dgraph, Kuzu, Gremlin Server and many more property graph databases.
Write Gremlin, Cypher, GQL and DQL queries easily using the G.V() built-in query editor, with syntax checking, autocomplete and embedded documentation. Save and organize your queries into folders, to easily maintain curated reports for your database.
Navigate, explorer and modify your graph data interactively with the graph database visualization feature. 
The graph visualization tools in G.V() give you both performance and flexibility, allowing you to render tens of thousands of elements and customize their appearance easily. And with just a few clicks, you can view, add, edit and delete vertices, edges and their properties, saving you time and effort writing individual update queries. Using G.V()'s graph visualization features, you can also filter and navigate your data by loading node neighbors in a couple clicks, making data exploration a breeze. The graph view offers you a variety of layouts that are configurable in a click.

Get a concise and central view of the structure of your data: G.V() automatically detects the data schema from your graph database and allows you to visualize it as an entity-relationship diagram in the Data Model Explorer. This improves collaboration between your users by providing an easy-to-understand, consolidated view of your graph data model.

For non-technical users, the no-code graph data explorer gives you the ability to retrieve and visualize data without the need to write a complex database query. Combined with the ability to create parameterized reports based on Gremlin, Cypher, GQL or DQL queries, your non-technical users have a range of actionable reporting tools at their fingertips.

Name: PledgX
Description:
Time is a valuable commodity that should not be spent assembling pre-qualification or qualification packages. Let us help put them together for you. 

With PledgX: 

1. Cut down on time spent searching for the right information.

With your first package completed, we save and store your information securely on the cloud to be accessed later. Every time you update or add something new, we update our database to ensure we have the most accurate and up-to-date information all in one place. 

2. Never fill out a form again.

Whenever you want to assemble a new package, we will pull all relevant information from our database and automatically populate your form. You can then make any edits required. 

3. Qualify for more jobs and bonding.

As each submission can be done in under a few hours, you can apply for more jobs in less time, winning more jobs! Your pre-qualification or qualification package information can also be used to accelerate the bonding process with your Broker.

Name: Synthera AI
Description:
We generate synthetic yield curves, equities, FX prices and more, so professional investors can test their portfolios on thousands of realistic but unseen market scenarios using cutting edge generative AI.

Our synthetic data is redefining portfolio analysis with AI-driven dynamic scenario testing, predictive analytics, and deep portfolio insights. Unlike traditional parametric methods that rely on static assumptions, our approach can detect emerging patterns and subtle yet significant shifts in asset correlations amid evolving market conditions, uncovering insights previously latent. Whilst traditional methods merely skim the surface with historical data, Monte Carlo simulations lose vital signals and underestimate tail risk, creating statistical blind spots that expose investors to unexpected risks. Our system comprehensively captures the full range of market scenarios, grasping dynamic, non-linear correlations and long-term dependencies that enable investors to identify untapped opportunities and mitigate latent risks with unmatched precision.

Name: Walmart Data Ventures
Description:
With approximately 255 million customers and members visiting more than 10,500 stores and numerous eCommerce websites in 19 countries, Walmart is uniquely positioned to serve customers how, when and where they want.  

Formed in 2021, Walmart Data Ventures unlocks the full value of Walmart’s first-party data, delivering actionable, customer-centric insights through Scintilla, our integrated insights ecosystem. Scintilla is now available in the U.S., Mexico, and Canada, offering Merchants and brands a comprehensive solution to make informed business decisions in today’s dynamic retail environment. 

The name ‘Scintilla,’ derived from the Latin word for ‘spark,’ embodies the power of a single insight to ignite transformative ideas. Even the smallest, most granular data point can drive decisions that create meaningful impact. Scintilla empowers businesses to turn insights into action, optimizing every touchpoint along the customer journey—from home to store—and the product journey—from source to shelf. 

At Walmart Data Ventures, our mission is to deliver value to customers, suppliers, merchants, and store operators by bridging insights with actionable strategies that enhance the retail experience.

Name: CALIGO
Description:
CALIGO is a Data and Analytics Service Provider, dedicated to enabling businesses to unlock the full potential of their data. We offer a comprehensive range of services to meet the diverse needs of organizations across industries such as banking, insurance, telecommunications, finance, and airlines. At CALIGO, we combine technical expertise with industry knowledge to deliver innovative, impactful solutions that empower our clients to turn data into their most valuable asset.

Our Services

* Data Analysis: Extracting actionable insights from vast datasets to inform business decisions, solve problems, and gain deeper understanding.

* Data Modeling: Designing structured data representations to organize, relate, and access data effectively, serving as a blueprint for database design.

* Data Engineering: Building reliable and scalable data pipelines using advanced programming languages and ETL tools to process and analyze large volumes of data.

* Data Architecture: Providing consultancy on data structure, integration, flow, and storage by creating blueprints for enterprise-wide data management.

* Data Operations: Monitoring data flows, optimizing performance, and addressing issues promptly to ensure reliability and stability of data processes.

* Data Visualization: Presenting data through intuitive BI tools to enable clear communication of insights to a wide range of audiences.

In addition to our services, we address customer needs with our prebuilt Data Warehouse Models and Data Maturity Assessment Framework, designed to accelerate data-driven initiatives:

* Banking Data Warehouse Data Model
* Insurance Data Warehouse Data Model
* Telco Data Warehouse Data Model
* Data Maturity Assessment Framework

For more information please visit our website.

Name: Cyclomedia
Description:
Cyclomedia Visualize a better world
Cyclomedia captures data from the real world and transforms it into valuable insights enabling you to understand the complexities of the environment around you. 

With the world’s most accurate 360°street-level visualizations, enhanced by innovative, AI-powered analytics, Cyclomedia delivers actionable insights that you can use today in order to build a better tomorrow.  Real data. True understanding. Big impact.

Cyclomedia develops, builds and operates the worlds most advanced mobile mapping systems. With a combination of sensors ranging from camera's  & Lidar scanners to state-of-the-art positioning systems we map dense urban areas in Western Europe and North America.   

The petabytes of data that we collect every year are used by “professional users”, ranging from city governments to large corporates working in utilities, infrastructure and insurance. Name: Maxwell GeoSystems
Description:
Maxwell GeoSystems stands out as an advanced Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) provider, dedicated to delivering innovative digital solutions tailored for the ground-engineering sector. Our platform, MissionOS, transforms complex project data into actionable insights, helping teams optimise efficiency and make informed decisions at any scale. Since being founded in 2004 by Dr. Angus Maxwell, we have expanded globally with operations in Hong Kong, Singapore, London (UK), Kochi (India) & Sydney (Australia).

Our product, the MissionOS, is the only integrated platform for construction software, covering GIS, Digital Twin, and Production Management Analytics, in a totally configurable & extendable way. It is set to transform the way construction is handled, not just in ground-engineering and tunnelling, but in all forms of development in construction, mining, asset management, and the environment. We consistently push the boundaries of construction technology, developing cloud-based software & mobile applications that revolutionise project management, data analytics, and decision-making processes.

With roots in the supply and analysis of geotechnical data, Maxwell GeoSystems understands the value of providing timely information to engineers, key decision-makers, and project stakeholders. The company has been actively involved in major infrastructure, mining, construction, and environmental projects throughout the world, in partnership with some of the leading construction companies and consultancies. The company has a proven track record of successfully accomplished projects.

Name: Apache Hudi
Description:
Open source pioneer of the lakehouse reimagining old-school batch processing with a powerful new incremental framework for low latency analytics. Hudi brings database and data warehouse capabilities to the data lake making it possible to create a unified data lakehouse for ETL, analytics, AI/ML, and more. Apache Hudi is battle-tested at scale powering some of the largest data lakes on the planet. 

Apache Hudi provides an open foundation that seamlessly connects to all other popular open source tools such as Spark, Presto, Trino, Flink, Hive, and so much more. Being an open source table format is not enough, Apache Hudi is also a comprehensive platform of open services and tools that are necessary to operate your data lakehouse in production at scale.

Most importantly, Apache Hudi is a community built by a diverse group of engineers from all around the globe! Hudi is a friendly and inviting open source community that is growing every day. Join the community in Github: https://github.com/apache/hudi or find links to email lists and slack channels on the Hudi website: https://hudi.apache.org/

Lunor AI is building the future of AI—together. We’re a decentralized platform where anyone can crowdfund, collaborate, and co-own AI systems. Researchers, builders, data scientists, and innovators from around the world come together on Lunor to solve real problems—and share in the value they create.

We launched Lunor with a bold idea: what if AI wasn’t just centralized, opaque, and owned by corporations? What if it was crowdsourced, open, and co-owned by the people building it? Turns out, that idea hits different. From data collection to model development to monetization—we’re rethinking every step of the AI pipeline.

At Lunor, "open" and "ownership" aren’t buzzwords—they’re the blueprint. We’re a team of rebels, researchers, and realists who believe AI should work for the people, with the people. Every quest on our platform is a challenge, a collaboration, and a chance to build something bigger than yourself. And yes, we believe memes are a valid form of expression. (You’ll see.)

Our values? Ownership. Collaboration. Curiosity. We give every team member the space to experiment, take big swings, and help shape the future of Lunor (and AI). If you’re someone who believes innovation should be a group activity, you’ll fit right in.

Join us. Bring your brain. Bring your weird. Bring your vision of what AI could be.

Name: RightData
Description:
RightData is a Data Product Platform that has everything you need to take raw data from any source and turn it into business-ready data. We have no-code tools to quickly & easily connect to data, cleanse it, prepare it, ensure it’s accurate and trusted, and then easily findable and actionable in an "Amazon-like" DataMarket. 
 
It all starts with the DataFactory: a data engineering product that provides everything you need to turn raw data into business-ready data product. With hundreds of connectors to any data source — on-premises, cloud-based, applications, and files — DataFactory makes it easy to ingest data, transform and wrangle data, and to build robust pipelines to any output you need. And, it’s all done with a drag-and-drop interface — no code required. 
 
The DataTrust product is built to ensure that your data products are clean and ready for use. It has data observability, data validation, and data reconciliation tools designed to work quickly and at massive scale. Machine learning makes finding issues faster and more accurate and automatically generates business rules for future data profiling. 
 
The DataMarket solves the problem of getting data the last mile to the end user by providing an easy but powerful place to find, access, and take action on data products. Using a familiar “Amazon-style” interface, user can search using natural language and then see details about data products like descriptions, quality ratings, reviews, metadata, and sample data. They can request access from the data product owner providing a fast and easy way to govern data usage. And, once they’ve received access, they can take action via built-in APIs, JDBC connectors or even perform basic analytics functions using the included “private ChatGPT-style” AI to render charts and graphs from plain-language requests.

On-chain Oracles are limited by their ability to scale, particularly on Ethereum. They are relatively inaccessible, bottlenecked by engineering teams, and, most notably, they lack transparency and true decentralization. Deploying a proprietary solution, Chronicle Protocol alleviates many of these limitations.

Chronicle Protocol is redefining access to cost-efficient and verifiable data. Users can subscribe and unsubscribe to Oracles on-demand, call for updated data at the click of a button, verify where every element of data has come from in a high integrity censorship-resistant environment, and plug and play with any supported blockchain via the self-serve, decentralized Dashboard.

Since 2017, Chronicle has secured over $10B for DeFi’s largest lending protocol, MakerDAO. And now, for the first time, Chronicle’s market-leading features are available to all Web3 builders anytime, anywhere.

Be it in helping businesses identify new customers or making natural disaster response more effective, GIS is being widely accepted as an essential computing infrastructure across organizations.

Name: DiGGrowth
Description:
DiGGrowth is an AI-powered marketing analytics and attribution platform built to unify your data, reveal performance insights, and accelerate revenue growth. 

We help CMOs, performance marketers, and RevOps teams move beyond siloed dashboards and spreadsheets by integrating all your marketing channels—paid media, CRM, email, web analytics, and more—into one actionable source of truth. 

From multi-touch attribution and predictive insights to automated reporting and data quality governance, DiGGrowth empowers marketing teams to make smarter decisions, optimize budgets, and drive measurable ROI. 

DiGGrowth’s AI agents also help turn your marketing stack into a self-driving revenue engine.  

The 5 Core Agents in the Platform: 

1. Data Quality Grader: Audits and cleans your CRM (Salesforce/HubSpot), eliminates duplicates, fixes broken lead-to-account matching, and ensures 100% data integrity for accurate reporting. 

2. Paid Media Agent: Unifies ad data from Google, LinkedIn, Meta, and Twitter. 
The agent also spots high-performing creatives and CPC trends in real-time, optimizing your budget allocation 24/7. 

3. ICP Analytics Agent: Uses predictive AI to build dynamic Ideal Customer Profiles based on historical sales data. The agent also identifies 'Lookalike Accounts' and grades them so your sales team never wastes time on a bad lead again. 

4. Email Marketing Agent: Connects email engagement (Opens/Clicks) directly to Revenue in the CRM. The agent moves beyond vanity metrics to prove the financial ROI of your nurture campaigns and newsletters. 

5. Metrics Hub & DiGGi-GPT: A unified "Single Source of Truth" dashboard powered by natural language AI. No more SQL queries. Just ask DiGGi-GPT, "Which campaign drove the most pipeline in Q3?" and get an instant answer. 

With DiGGrowth, marketing becomes your revenue engine. No more endless spreadsheets, no more blind spots — just clear insights, smarter spend, and faster growth.

Name: Data, Policy and Innovation Centre (DPIC)
Description:
The Data, Policy & Innovation Centre (DPIC) is a unique partnership between the State Government of Odisha and the University of Chicago Trust (UCT) in India designed to harness the power of data and research to drive governance in Odisha.


The Centre, located in the state capital, Bhubaneswar, aims to be a modern data and research hub leveraging cutting-edge data science tools and advanced research methods to drive evidence-based decision-making in Odisha. In an era where data is crucial for governance, DPIC’s embedded structure enables close collaboration between government and academia, fostering practical and impactful solutions to address real world policy challenges.

Why are we unique?

Integrated Approach: Our work spans the full data-to-policy cycle – from curating high-quality datasets, extracting analytical insights, conducting rigorous research and building data capabilities within government.
Ground Presence: Our field presence and close collaboration with government help unlock access to data and enable researchers to co-create projects with government, thereby meaningfully contribute to advancing evidence-driven governance
Broad Mandate: Our work is spread across multiple sectors, creating cross-cutting data frameworks that can inform interconnected policy decisions and drive comprehensive development outcomes.

Our Approach and Impact

DPIC’s work is structured around three core pillars:
Data Curation: We transform fragmented, difficult to access administrative datasets into high-quality, analysis-ready resources that reveal meaningful patterns and insights.
Analytics and Research: We apply sophisticated data analytics and research techniques to evaluate government programs or to test policy innovations and generate actionable evidence for public policy.
Capacity Building: We support training of public officials in data management and use and help institutionalise a data-driven culture within government.

Enterprises slash observability bills up to 80% by intelligently filtering noise, deduplicating attributes, stripping PII, and optimizing logs in real time. Sawmills sits in front of observability tools, providing a smart telemetry pipeline that helps cut costly ingestion and improve the quality of data.  

Our AI-driven approach addresses the challenges of out-of-control observability costs, high cardinality metrics, and excessive log ingestion, providing a smart, cost-effective solution for telemetry pipeline management. We leverage AI to continuously detect noise patterns, identify duplicate and near-duplicate events, flag low-value attributes, manage cardinality explosions, enforce PII/policy violations, and rectify broken schemas, which reduces log ingestions, saving money and maintaining visibility. 

Built on OpenTelemetry, the Sawmills telemetry pipeline ensures flexibility and avoids vendor lock-in. It offers effortless management through an intuitive user interface, centralizing telemetry management, enabling you to apply open telemetry filter logs before sending. We provide smart policies to monitor critical thresholds, preventing overages and outages through automated actions like alerting, sampling, and rerouting data, making us a superior telemetry pipeline tool.  

Sawmills changes the landscape of telemetry management, offering a definitive answer to “how do I reduce observability costs" and "how to reduce Datadog costs" by providing the best AI telemetry pipeline and enabling you to filter out noisy logs at scale. Our focus on optimization before ingestion makes us a crucial component in any modern observability stack, allowing you to regain control over telemetry data, reduce logging that is too expensive, and maintain system reliability.

Name: Infotopics
Description:
Infotopics is passie voor Business Intelligence (BI) en datavisualisatie. Wij werken graag voor en met onze klanten en partners aan innovatieve en gebruikersvriendelijke oplossingen. Oplossingen die onze klanten helpen om te sturen met inzicht.

Infotopics is opgericht in 2003 om business intelligence te leveren met een zo klein mogelijke ICT component. Het draait immers om inzicht in data en niet om technologie. Het Microsoft BI platform bood ons daarvoor de beste mogelijkheid. We gebruiken dit platform, vele versies later én beter, nog steeds naar tevredenheid.

Het streven naar eenvoud bracht ons in 2010 naar Tableau Software in Seattle. Hun revolutionaire datavisualisatie software en opvatting over BI maakte ons direct enthousiast. Het menselijk brein als uitgangspunt voor de wijze waarop je informatie presenteert. Goed visual design is nu ingebakken in alle door ons opgeleverde rapportages en dashboards. Ook als deze niet in Tableau worden gerealiseerd.

Want pas als je iets ziet kun je het begrijpen en begrip is nodig voor het nemen van de juiste acties. Managementinformatie met impact noemen wij dat. Managementinformatie die een organisatie in staat stelt om letterlijk en figuurlijk te sturen met inzicht!

Name: AlphaSheet.io
Description:
AlphaSheet is a no-code business intelligence tool that helps businesses or individuals to browse the data into their favorite software MS-Excel. 

Generally excel users or business intelligence users require to browse data from multiple data sources to analyze to make business decisions. Alphasheet can help users with browsing many data sources into MS-Excel without requiring to write any code.

Microsoft Excel is the go-to choice for many of these users to collate/analyze the data. In many cases, this same analysis is also repeated on a periodic basis (e.g., month end sales reconciliation).

However, this is very manual/cumbersome and error prone:
•	Download data from one or more source systems
•	Get them in Excel/csv format and upload into an Excel sheet
•	Connect the data from multiple systems using common data elements
•	Perform the analysis needed
•	Render the report as required

Many tools have emerged to make this easier (e.g., Tableau, PowerBI) and the software providers have made the integrations simpler. Yet, for a vast majority of the cases, Excel/Google Sheets remains the go-to choice for many users. As a result, there is a strong market need for an Excel plug-in that can automatically
•	Pull the data from multiple sources
•	Provide the necessary connections/reconciliations using the preferred data elements
•	Do the pre-defined analyses 
•	Render the data as desired

AlphaSheet solves all those problems and helps users focusing on actual analytics without worrying source of data.

Description:
Als onafhankelijke intermediair en datamakelaar levert Farminform gebruikers een schat aan data over meer dan twintigduizend geneesmiddelen.
Van oorsprong is Farminform een datacollectief, bestaande uit geneesmiddelenproducenten en de groothandelaren die de geneesmiddelen distribueren. Het verzamelen, verrijken en verstrekken van (logistieke) data over geneesmiddelen was decennialang de basis van het bedrijf.
Nog altijd levert Farminform data, waaronder gebruiks- en logistieke informatie over meer dan twintigduizend geneesmiddelen. De uitgebreide databases van Farminform maken uitwisseling van hoogwaardige, betrouwbare marktinformatie mogelijk. Publieke instanties zoals de overheid gebruiken deze data, onder meer om de effecten van het landelijke geneesmiddelenbeleid te monitoren en bij te sturen. Met de inzichten in de Nederlandse geneesmiddelenmarkt die Farminform biedt, blijven zorgverleners en farmaceutische bedrijven up-to-date over de meest recente ontwikkelingen in de markt. Op basis daarvan kunnen ze hun beleid effectief vormgeven.

In lijn met de veranderende informatiebehoefte van de huidige gebruikers, wordt het huidige businessmodel momenteel verder ontwikkeld en uitgebreid. Het te ontwikkelen zorgdatamodel zal geïntegreerde, anonieme klinische en farmaceutische data bevatten. Zowel zorgverleners, patiënten als fabrikanten zijn gebaat bij de inzet van dit geïntegreerde model.

Name: Omega X
Description:
Omega-X stands for Orchestrating an interoperable sovereign federated Multi-vector Energy data space built on open standards and ready for GAia-X.

The aim of this European research and innovation action is to implement a data space (based on European common standards), including federated infrastructure, data marketplace and service marketplace, involving data sharing between different stakeholders and demonstrating its value for real and concrete Energy use cases and needs, while guaranteeing scalability and interoperability with other data space initiatives, not just for energy but also cross-sector.

The proposed concept and architecture heavily rely on the approaches adopted by IDSA, GAIA-X, FIWARE, BDVA/DAIRO and SGAM as major EU references regarding data spaces. It will pursue the GAIA-X label, which ensures highest standards on protection, security, transparency, openness and trust, avoids vendor lock-in and is restricted to EU countries.

Name: The IUPHAR/BPS Guide to PHARMACOLOGY
Description:
The IUPHAR/BPS Guide to PHARMACOLOGY (GtoPdb), created in a collaboration between The British Pharmacological Society (BPS) and the International Union of Basic and Clinical Pharmacology (IUPHAR), aims to be a “one-stop shop” source of quantitative information on drug targets and the prescription medicines and experimental drugs that act on them. We hope that the Guide to Pharmacology will be useful for researchers and students in pharmacology and drug discovery and provide the general public with accurate information on the basic science underlying drug action. 

The current version of the database contains: 

- Succinct overviews of the key properties and recommended ligands of over 2,800 established or potential pharmacological targets, organised by family or group of related targets;

- Over 8,800 small molecule, peptide and antibody experimental compounds and approved drugs;

- Over 15,000 curated interactions and binding constants between ligands and targets.

This information was originally based on data published in the 5th (2011) edition of the BPS Guide to Receptors and Channels (GRAC), now updated in the 2015/16 Concise Guide to Pharmacology (http://www.guidetopharmacology.org/concise) with new information and targets.

More detailed information is provided for a subset of important targets, many of which were contained in the original IUPHAR database. These detailed view pages provide in-depth coverage of the properties and ligands of G protein-coupled receptors (GPCRs), ion channels, nuclear receptors and kinases, curated and peer-reviewed by a network of 800 experts. The original IUPHAR-DB site is no longer being developed and all content from that site is now included in the Guide to PHARMACOLOGY.

The Guide to PHARMACOLOGY team can be contacted via the email address enquiries <at> guidetopharmacology <dot> org

Name: Coblocks (YC F24)
Description:
Coblocks is a thoughtfully-designed data platform that helps teams write queries and automate workflows faster.

We understand the columns, tables, and relationships in your data and use them to help anyone on your team build pipelines with AI, SQL and Python. Think of us like Cursor for data engineering.

Here’s how we’re different:

• All-in-one: You can get started in 2 minutes – no setup or configuration required. We have one-click integrations, warehousing, transformation, and schedules all built in.
• Seamless integrations: Plug in your Postgres database, Stripe transactions, Hubspot leads, or any other data source, without writing code to keep things in sync.
• Thoughtful AI: We love Cursor and we love data – we combined the two to help you write accurate queries. We use existing metadata to help you create new datasets, connect sources, fix errors, or edit in place.
• Collaborative: Easily share data and discover what others in your org have built as a starting place for your analysis. Wrap common blocks of logic with templates so your team never has to start from zero.
• Resilient and Scalable: Our compute engine is lightning-fast for queries and builds. Git and branching are built-in for both code and data, so you can time-travel backwards when things break. You can start with GBs and grow to TBs.
