Name: Chill Data Summit
Description:
The Chill Data Summit is a community led knowledge sharing resource for Apache Iceberg. As lakehouse architecture amasses popularity and Iceberg emerges as the clear leader in open table formats, we are here to help each other learn and stay abreast of practical know-how as well as theoretical expertise in all things Iceberg.

The Chill Data Summit community provides 
- technical training and troubleshooting, 
- in-depth discussions on new advancements, 
- a monthly roundup of community and project highlights, 
- and opportunities to gather in person and virtually.

Active participation by community members is crucial for the growth of this community, and corporate sponsorship to help fund events is appreciated.

---------

On February 6th 2024, Upsolver hosted the first community summit for Apache Iceberg users, dedicated to learning about the open table format and lakehouse architecture. This marked the first ever Chill Data Summit event. Boasting three keynotes and fifteen talks from industry experts, the summit saw over 500 live attendees, and covered topics from technical implementation and integrations to philosophical discussions on how to think of databases and data modeling in the lakehouse era.

Subscribe to our Apache Iceberg Community Newsletter: https://chilldatasummit.substack.com

Our role is to connect organisations, and citizens, in our region to appropriate data in order to help improve service delivery and solve big problems. We want to create a vibrant, internationally visible, civic data environment which will enable residents’ data to work harder for them to shape better care and fuel globally important innovations from the Liverpool City Region. Based on a collaborative, transparent and inclusive approach to governance, the Civic Data Cooperative will support people and organisations to:

Understand and act on the insights from civic data
Provide innovative solutions to real-life problems
Facilitate access to open sources of civic data
Test models for ethical, inclusive use of health data
Through this collaborative process, we believe we can encourage positive health and well-being changes across the Liverpool City Region.

Ziel ist es, diese Daten an einer Stelle auffindbar und so einfacher nutzbar zu machen. Im Sinne von „Open Data" ist es unser Bestreben, die Verwendung offener Lizenzen zu fördern und das Angebot von maschinenlesbaren Rohdaten zu erhöhen. Das ist ein langer Weg und alle Beteiligten braucht Zeit, um diesen Kulturwandel umzusetzen. Darum beinhaltet GovData auch nicht nur offene Daten, sondern auch solche, die eingeschränkt nutzbar sind. Wir gehen davon aus, dass wir auf diese Weise langfristig am Besten vorankommen. Weitere Informationen zu diesen Fragestellungen finden Sie zum Beispiel in den Fragen und Antworten von GovData.

Name: PyData London
Description:
We are London’s community for developers and users of Python data tools.

Run by volunteers, PyData London provides a forum for users and developers of data analysis tools to share ideas and learn from each other. We run monthly events on the first Tuesday of each month, in addition to annual conferences.  We promote discussion of best practices, new approaches, and emerging technologies for data management, processing, analytics, and visualisation. PyData communities approach data science using many languages, including (but not limited to) Python, Julia, and R. Sign up to our next event on Meetup and follow us on Twitter for the latest news!

PyData London is the London chapter of the international PyData community. PyData is organised by NumFOCUS.org, a non-profit organisation which supports and promotes world-class, innovative, open source scientific software. The PyData Code of Conduct ( http://pydata.org/code-of-conduct.html ) governs our events.

Twitter: @PyDataLondon

Name: HyperSpectral
Description:
HyperSpectral is the world’s first AI-powered spectral intelligence solution for illuminating invisible threats and unlocking valuable insights. Our SpecAI platform has universal applicability, with proven value across a range of industries, including food safety, MedTech, health care, quality control, manufacturing, environment and defense.

We’ve pioneered the use of AI to identify unique patterns in the electromagnetic spectrum from any material or surface with a simple, quick scan. Our hardware-agnostic technology combines spectroscopy’s
ability to identify spectral signatures from different sources and artificial intelligence’s power to be trained on large, custom datasets to recognize different particle signatures in near real time.

Our platform works with a wide array of devices and integrates proprietary, open source, internal and external datasets, allowing customers to easily incorporate our software and get the insights they need for effective decision-making.

The results will revolutionize how the food safety and health care industries detect dangerous pathogens such as E. coli, salmonella, listeria, staph aureus and others. In the years ahead, we believe this technology holds the power to dramatically change the way many business sectors and industries operate.

Name: Entegrata
Description:
Law firms have long struggled with having clean, accurate, and readily available data at their fingertips. Beyond some flavor of financial warehouse, firms have increasingly been challenged with having faster, easier access to all its data. With greater client demands, competition, and stress on firm leadership to manage less on gut intuition, being a data-driven law firm has become a strategic imperative.

Leveraging his 25+ years in the legal industry as CIO/CKO at Sheppard Mullin, Cadwalader and Reed Smith alongside consulting for 7 years to many of the top firms in the globe, Tom Baldwin has become an expert on law firm data.  In his 7 years of consulting he started a data practice and led data strategy engagements, management/executive committee dashboard design and data lake envisioning efforts at many Am Law 200 firms.  These experiences sharpened his views on the challenges law firms face with data and how to solve them, but there was no easy answer.  

We realized there needed to be a product on the market to help firms solve this problem. Firms had to spend hundreds of thousands, if not millions, of dollars on out-of-industry data people who needed years to figure things out, only to realize that there was no tangible outcome in sight. Or buy a narrowly focused, fit-for-purpose, data solution that may solve one need but not provide a holistic view of all their data – integrated in a safe, secure way and provide simple and easy dashboards for lawyers and business professionals. Until now.

Description:
The year was 2012. The view was of the Pacific. The venue: the xChange Conference hosted by Semphonic where I had been invited to attend as a huddle leader by Gary Angel. The conversation topic: what else? Experimentation. But, mid-conversation (mid-revelation, really), their time was up and they needed to move to the next “huddle.” An audible groan of disappointment arose. So I encouraged everyone to continue the conversation via email. From that email chain, we decided to have a monthly teleconference—I called it a “tele-huddle". Eventually, I decided to expand to include others and shifted to Zoom.

Each month, we'd meet on Zoom to support each other with whatever topics we were working on in our respective jobs - sometimes with planned topics, sometimes just mentoring each other. Always with the purpose of teaching and learning. People dropped out and others joined along the way with the size of the community staying around 20-40 people for the first several years until we decided to start the Slack community and change the format to invite industry leaders to present and have live recorded panel discussions. (Shout out to our friends at measure.chat and the analyticshour.io for those inspirations.)

The one thing that has always remained true to the original intention of the community - the TLC was designed as a place for people to teach, learn, and converse. And it remains so today. No sales or solicitation of members is ever allowed and all questions are welcome and encouraged. The environment should be welcoming and no one should ever feel worried that they'll get bullied for asking a "dumb question". That's not what the TLC is. Everyone here wants to help - and if anyone is not helpful, they'll be invited to leave.

Because of the welcoming and encouraging atmosphere of sharing and learning, the TLC has grown to a community of well over 1,000 members and is continuing to grow. Members include industry leaders and those just getting started from research, an

Name: Women in Analytics Conference
Description:
The WiAC is an annual one-day conference that highlights and connects women data professionals for a day of networking and professional development. The conference is organized by women at Meta and is free for attendees.
 
Our Mission Statement
The Women in Analytics Conference aims to create a space for women in data professions to come together. We believe this is important for three key reasons:
 
- Representation matters: you can't be what you can't see. Representation affects not only how others view individuals from an under-represented group, but also how those individuals view themselves and the opportunities available to them. The WiAC serves to celebrate and showcase women leaders in data.
 
- Networking matters: peer-to-peer connections are a primary driver of career growth and the ability to access opportunities across companies, industries and seniority levels. The WiAC serves to bring together women from across companies to meet, mingle and connect.
 
- Learning matters: too often the day-to-day cadence of data jobs makes it hard to find the time to devote to learning about new approaches, techniques and problems. The WiAC serves to create that space for practitioners of data to share their craft with each other.
We use an inclusive definition of “woman” and we welcome trans women, genderqueer women, and non-binary people.

Name: Project 990 Inc.
Description:
Philanthropic foundations and donor advised funds are a critical component of the U.S. Nonprofit sector that provide substantial funding to nonprofits and the communities they serve. 

Collectively, they possess over $1 trillion in assets and distribute over $100 billion in grants each year. Given their abundant resources, institutional philanthropy has the capacity to significantly address critical social needs.  

However, the overall scope, scale, and impact of this sector have been difficult to quantify and analyze. 

Project 990 is addressing this challenge.  

We are building a comprehensive data platform that aggregates and synthesizes information from millions of tax filings, grants, and other sources related to charitable giving. Our goal is to empower researchers, foundations, nonprofit leaders, policymakers, and the public with actionable insights into philanthropic giving and charitable activity in the U.S. 

To learn more about our mission, please visit https://bradrfulton.com/.

Description:
SPIN • Smart Products Infrastructure Network, Inc.

We build infrastructure that turns physical products into AI powered, revenue-generating nodes.

SPIN OS is a hardware and software infrastructure that connects RFID (NFC+UHF), AI agents, services and Digital Product Passport (DPP) into one programmable product network.

Every item gains a digital identity, on-chain IP authentication, and lifecycle automation—from manufacturing, retail, engagement, compliance, to resale.

We work with some of the world’s most forward-thinking institutions—LVMH, Kering, Vogue, H&M, Galeries Lafayette, Grand Palais, PIACENZA 1733, and SAITEX—and collaborate with PwC, Deloitte, NVIDIA, and the European Union to bring product intelligence to scale.

SPIN OS also powers the EU Project Horizon TRICK initiative, where we co-lead the creation of the official on-chain Digital Product Passport standards. Through this work, SPIN provides the hardware–software infrastructure that enables brands to become compliance-ready for the mandatory DPP requirements coming into force across Europe in 2027.

Learn more at spinfrequency.com

Description:
TierX is a startup that provides innovative and high-quality data center infrastructure solutions. The company's mission is to deliver reliable and sustainable technology that is tailored to meet the unique needs of its customers, with a focus on building long-term partnerships based on trust and customer success.


As a strategic partner, TierX brings extensive industry expertise, with a leadership team that has a combined 60 years of experience from leading data center companies. The company is currently building a large-scale manufacturing facility and R&D Center in Bangalore, which will cover an area of 80,000 sq. ft. and is expected to be completed by April 2025.


Product Offerings:


TierX Room Solutions: TierX provides Pre-Fab Room DC Solutions for both outdoor and indoor use. These solutions are scalable from 40 to 180 sq.m and have power options ranging from 30KW to 1280KW. They feature up to 120 minutes of fire resistance, an IP66 rating for ingress protection, and RC3 security to prevent unauthorized access. These solutions are fully customizable and are manufactured in-house with a capacity of 100 rooms per year.





TierX Rack Solutions: The company manufactures a variety of racks, including Server Racks, Network Racks, Open Frame Racks, and Wall Mount Racks. The manufacturing facility has a production capacity of 6,000 racks per month and utilizes a Lean Manufacturing System for superior quality and timely delivery. A dedicated design team is available to create customized solutions for customers.

Name: Winelab Laboratório de Análises
Description:
O Laboratório Winelab, localizado na cidade de Itajaí/SC, está no mercado desde 2011, tendo como foco atender as demandas analíticas dos produtores, exportadores e importadores de bebidas de todo território nacional. É um laboratório especializado em análises físico-químicas de bebidas alcoólicas e não alcoólicas. 

É pioneira em Santa Catarina na área de bebidas como laboratório acreditado pela CGCRE para Ensaios NBR ISO/IEC 17025 sob número de CRL 0641 e credenciado pelo MAPA em bebida fermentada alcoólica. 

O Laboratório possui instalações físicas adequadas, equipamentos de ponta calibrados, time de profissionais sérios, comprometidos e experientes, garantindo, assim, a qualidade dos ensaios realizados, com resultados confiáveis e segurança analítica aos clientes. 

A equipe é composta por profissionais de nível médio técnico e superior. Nosso time está constantemente em processo de atualização, buscando aperfeiçoamento e aprimoramento das técnicas e métodos. 

Para a Winelab, nossa equipe é uma família e o cliente uma extensão da empresa. Assim sendo, visamos a melhoria contínua dos serviços oferecidos e estamos sempre dispostos a nos adequar aos anseios e necessidades do cliente e do mercado, tornando assim cada atendimento único e personalizado.

Description:

Plattform für Zähler- und Energiemonitoring

Das primäre Ziel dieses Vorhabens besteht darin, eine fortschrittliche Software-Hardware-Kombination zu entwickeln, die das bestehende Leistungsangebot von cenero.one erweitert. Diese neue Lösung wird speziell dafür konzipiert, Datenübertragungsfehler automatisch zu identifizieren und zu melden sowie eine gründliche Plausibilitätsprüfung der Verbrauchsdaten durchzuführen. Eine solche Fähigkeit ist entscheidend für die Aufdeckung von Einsparpotenzialen, die, wenn effektiv umgesetzt, nicht nur den Energieverbrauch und damit verbundene Kosten signifikant reduzieren, sondern auch zu einer merklichen Verringerung der Treibhausgasemissionen beitragen.

Mit diesem innovativen Ansatz strebt cenero.one danach, einen wesentlichen Beitrag zur nachhaltigen Transformation von Energiemanagement und -verbrauch zu leisten.

www.europa-fordert-sachsen.de
Kofinanziert von der Europäischen Union

Minute-by-minute fixture-level analysis allows property owners to equitably submeter water bills, to identify and fix leaks and to eliminate non-revenue water. The company has established a large connected base of software subscriptions within manufactured housing parks, multi-family residential Real Estate and Commercial Real Estate. On the Utility side, the Company is one of the first providers of cellular-enabled advanced metering infrastructure (AMI) with dashboard alert analytics, disrupting the market by bringing smart metering to smaller utilities. These capabilities were previously only partially available to larger cities with fixed network AMI systems. The company’s software and other innovations within meter electronics have allowed the company to drive exceptional growth and profitability with a premium-positioned offering. The winning combination of the company’s high data resolution meters and one-minute analytics establishes safe hands status with Real Estate and Utility customers. 

Commercially, Metron is one of the fastest growing companies within the digital water space, having achieved market-leading year-over-year growth. In 2019, Metron partnered with XPV Water Partners, the world’s leading Water investor. XPV has extended the investment horizon based on their conviction in Metron Farnier’s growth potential.

Name: Cambridge Sports Analytics
Description:
Cambridge Sports Analytics (CSA) is a leader in sports analytics and predictive technology, providing cutting-edge solutions to teams, analysts, and sports professionals. CSA deploys a groundbreaking model-free prediction system called Relevance-Based Prediction (RBP) that offers compelling advantages over conventional prediction methods such as linear regression analysis as well as more advanced machine learning models such as neural networks.

CSA offers two core solutions built to support high-level decision-making: the CSA Vault, a comprehensive database of pre-processed predictions for a large menu of performance metrics, and the CSA Prediction Engine. The CSA Prediction Engine is a robust, resilient, and flexible prediction and analytics API that interacts with any dataset of predictive variables and outcomes. CSA’s technology equips users with precise, interpretable predictions - designed for the complexity of elite sports.

Name: Finera Finansal Veri Analizi
Description:
Finera, küresel, ulusal ve şirketlere özgü verileri makine öğrenmesi ve yapay zeka algoritmaları ile analiz ederek paydaşlarına makro ve mikro ölçekte rekabet avantajı sağlamayı hedefler. Türkiye’nin ve Türkiye ile yakın ekonomik ilişkilere sahip ülkelerin ekonomik göstergelerini derinlemesine analiz eder ve bu analizleri kapsamlı raporlar halinde sunar.
Bu raporlar, makro ekonomik göstergelerden sektörel analizlere, kur ve faiz oranı risklerinden emtia risklerine, sektörlere yön veren şirketlerin detaylı incelemelerine kadar geniş bir yelpazeyi kapsar. Elde edilen veriler, ekonometri, makine öğrenmesi ve yapay zeka araçları kullanılarak analiz edilip, bütüncül ve sistematik bir çıkarım yapılır. Aylık olarak sunulan bu raporlar, okuyucularına gelecek bir aylık dönemde öngörü kazandırmayı amaçlar.
FİNERA, şirketlerin finansal ve finansal olmayan verilerini analiz ederek detaylı raporlar sunar. Farklı grup ve statülerde yapılan analizler sonucunda şirketiniz hakkında kapsamlı içgörüler elde edilir. FİNERA, şirketlere özel çözümleri sayesinde veri analizine dayalı rekabet üstünlüğü kazandırmayı misyon edinmiştir.
FİNERA, finansal analizde yeni bir dönem başlatıyor... 
FİNERA, veri analizine dayalı rekabet üstünlüğü sağlar...

VoltVision’s solutions are no CAPEX, ‘quick-win’, low-cost and deliver fast return on investment (typically three months).

Name: GeoDanmark
Description:
GeoDanmark – det fælles datagrundlag
Foreningen GeoDanmark er skabt i samarbejde mellem Danmarks 98 kommuner og Styrelsen for Dataforsyning og Infrastruktur (SDFI), med et samlet fokus på at levere geografiske grunddata. Vores data er præcise, aktuelle, kombinerbare og frit tilgængelige. Det styrker det offentlige beslutningsgrundlag på tværs af myndigheder og sektorer.

GeoDanmarks grunddata giver en landsdækkende, aktuel og præcis information om alt der kan ses fra luften, bl.a. bygninger, veje, vandløb og topografi.  Vores fælles datagrundlag er derfor vigtigt, når der fx skal bygges boliger, anlægges veje, klimasikres og beskyttes natur- og vandområder. 

Vi gør det muligt at sammenstille geografiske data med andre grunddata og data om fx forsyning, miljø og sundhed. Vores data giver grundlag for udvikling af nye datadrevne løsninger og forretningsmodeller, både i den private og offentlige sektor. Dermed bliver det lettere at etablere tværoffentligt samarbejde om blandt andet klimatilpasning og anlæg på tværs af kommuner.

Med over 15 års erfaring i at samarbejde om data, kan vi sikre, at både kommuner, stat, borgere og virksomheder i Danmark har fri og gratis adgang til de samme informationer. Dermed kan der træffes beslutninger baseret på et fælles datagrundlag.

GeoDanmark er en unik tværoffentlig konstellation, hvor samarbejdet er med til at styrke det lokale kendskab og sikre en helhedsorienteret tilgang til opgaverne. Med adgang til pålidelige og fællesoffentlige autoritative grunddata, kan vi sammen skabe en mere bæredygtig udvikling af Danmark.

Они оказывают влияние на законодательство, политиков, правоохранительные органы, прокуроров и судей, то есть, по сути, на всех, кому поручено защищать людей от подобных действий.

Используя различные методы психологической манипуляции, они ведут скрытую войну против человечества.
Эти силы уже изменили мир, проникли в наше сознание и хотят привести наше общество к диктатуре и тирании нашими собственными действиями. Depuis plusieurs années, la volatilité des prix des matières premières atteint des niveaux sans précédent. Elle est en grande partie due à l'instabilité géopolitique et aux événements climatiques extrêmes qui vont se multiplier dans le futur, en lien avec le changement climatique.  
Cette volatilité a un impact direct sur la rentabilité et la pérennité des activités tout au long de la chaîne de valeur, depuis les producteurs de matières premières jusqu'aux consommateurs. 

A l’image du mouvement récent des agriculteurs, les producteurs/ éleveurs comme les acteurs industriels ont besoin de retrouver la maîtrise des prix afin de sécuriser leurs revenus et leurs coûts d'approvisionnement, pour pouvoir se projeter dans le futur.

Quideos leur permet de le faire en proposant des produits de couverture innovants, portant sur la totalité des matières premières agricoles, et visant à sécuriser leur marge face à la volatilité des prix.

Our best solution to radically change the way we create families, sustain the population and support the economy is rooted in fertility care. But the system is broken.

We’re empowering everyone involved to fix it. Improving clarity, access and innovation across the board, data-matching patients and clinics – from the biggest pan-european clinic groups to boutique bespoke services – in a unique feedback loop that connects all parties for mutual benefit. We are backed by US and European VCs and led by Kayleigh Hartigan who has over 20 years experience in supporting people to access better healthcare in the NHS, government, private equity and tech spheres. She is committed to changing the future of fertility. 

The data-driven products that power our ecosystem include: 

- Our NHS Eligibility Calculator algorithm that uses millions of data points to quickly determine what NHS treatment each user is eligible for.  
- Our Matching Funnel algorithm that educates and empowers the user to navigate the pretreatment process, connecting them to the right clinic for their unique needs, improving their ongoing costs, experience and outcomes.
 - Our Clinic Profiles, which collate, validate, analyse and contextualise each clinic’s data into impactful information points, for transparent decision making and innovation.
- Extensive and dynamic Community Insights that create connection through shared experience, allowing users to take control and clinics to create targeted change.
- And Educational Tools & Expert Access, ensuring everyone in the fertility system is better connected, and can trust, learn and benefit from our work.

Weather Stations use environmental sensors to measure critical environmental data including: precipitation, soil moisture, leaf wetness, temperature, relative humidity, wind and growing degree days. But, how do we make sense of all this information? Crop Intelligence was built to interpret this data to assist farmers in making agronomic decisions and optimize return on investment.

The Crop Intelligence App interprets weather station data by using crop available moisture, accumulative rainfall, expected precipitation to model yield potential throughout the growing season, allowing a farmer to make real time decisions on their farm with confidence.

enRichMyData delivers an open software toolbox – the enRichMyData toolbox – comprising practical, robust and scalable components to support organizations in enriching their data with reference data they may have limited knowledge of, as well as supporting data providers in making their data reusable and available in data enrichment processes.
The toolbox lowers the technological entry barriers by providing support for the definition of highly scalable and replicable data enrichment pipelines through a set of tools and infrastructure services related to capabilities needed during the lifecycle of enrichment pipelines. The consortium consists of 14 partners from 12 countries. Additionally, one research institute and one international organisation are involved. EnrichMyData gathers three SMEs and five large companies that prioritise the business focus of the project in achieving high business impacts.

Name: Data Leads IL
Description:
We are a group of data leads who want to learn from each other. While attending talks and lectures can be valuable, we often find that we benefit the most from talking to each other, sharing our experiences, asking questions, and hearing ideas.

Although there are such communities for software engineers, we couldn't find one that focused specifically on data engineering. That's why we decided to create this group.

Once a month, we choose a topic and gather around a table to discuss it. Unlike traditional talks, there is no speaker or presentation – we simply sit and talk to each other.

How does it work?
1. Anyone can suggest a topic for discussion.
2. Group members vote on the suggested topics, and the one with the most votes is chosen for the next event.
3. we meet in person at a hosting company and gather in a circle to discuss the chosen topic.
4. Keep the discussion in our WhatsApp group. This way, we can keep the conversation going and build lasting connections with other data professionals.

Vote and suggest new topics - https://bit.ly/dl-topics-suggestions

Join our WhatsApp group - https://bit.ly/data-leads-il-whatsapp

Name: Géo Vendée
Description:
Né en 2006 de l’Information Géographique, Géo Vendée (www.geovendee.fr) est aujourd’hui la plateforme DATA du Département de la Vendée.

Géo Vendée développe des solutions numériques DATA pour l’ensemble de la sphère publique Vendéenne. Sa gouvernance s’articule autour du Département de la Vendée, du syndicat Départemental d’Energie et d’équipement de la Vendée (SYDEV), du syndicat d’alimentation en eau potable de la Vendée (Vendée Eau), du syndicat mixte départemental d'études et de traitement des déchets ménagers et assimilés de la Vendée (Trillais) et Vendée Numérique. La gouvernance de Géo Vendée c’est aussi les EPCI et communes de Vendée ainsi que les autres organismes publics comme le SDIS, Vendée Habitat ou encore l’Etablissement Public Foncier (EPF).

Géo Vendée est acteur du programme Départemental Vendée Territoire Connecté, initié et animé par Vendée Numérique et conduit

 des projets majeurs, structurants et très innovants comme :
•	Le jumeau numérique Départemental lauréat de l'AAP de la Banque des territoires (volet Démonstrateur d'IA frugale au service de la transition écologique des territoires/France 2030).
•	Le cadastre solaire Départemental (pour le Sydev),
•	Le Plan de Corps de Rue Simplifié. http://www.geovendee.fr/accueil/les_services_pro/le_corps_de_rue_simplifie
•	La Base Adresse Locale Vendée
•	Les Observatoires du ZAN et la démat de l'instruction du Sol, des déchetteries (https://trivalis.fr/lobservatoire-un-outil-dynamique/), des friches industrielles…
Géo Vendée assure des missionsde conseil dans tous les domaines de la gestion des DATAs et des systèmes d’information géographique, et ce concernant les aspects juridiques, administratifs et techniques.

Géo Vendée est situé eu 65 rue Kepler, La-Roche-Sur-Yon, Pays de la Loire, France.

Name: Geodd
Description:
We deliver verifiable technical assurances, including zero data retention, single-tenant infrastructure, and encrypted-in-use processing, that mitigate risks beyond the scope of compliance. These safeguards are measurable, transparent, and independently testable.

  No logs are generated, ensuring there is nothing that can be subpoenaed or compromised.
  Workloads remain inaccessible to personnel by design, with controls that remove operator-level exposure.
  Dedicated, single-tenant nodes guarantee isolation, eliminating the risk of side-channel data leakage.

Our architecture enforces what compliance only promises.Your AI inference remains private, recoverable only to you, and under your control.

Name: DataYacht

Navigating Data Seas with Elegance and Precision! 

Don’t worry about keeping your data architecture afloat. We have a yacht ready for you. At DataYacht, we provide state-of-the-art full-service data architecture solutions tailored for your needs.

Assessment
Our assessment involves a comprehensive evaluation of data streams, meticulously analysing key factors such as speed, efficiency, compliance with privacy and security legislation, and overall effectiveness. We conduct a thorough examination of existing systems, delving deep to identify any bottlenecks, inefficiencies, and potential vulnerabilities. 


Design
Our design forms the bedrock of your new data architecture.  It encompasses a Miro design board featuring the most fitting tools and pipelines, a business case document highlighting the financial and technological advantages, and, if required, an implementation quote and timeline.

Implementation
While designs lay the foundation, the pivotal moment for your company lies in the implementation of the new data architecture. At DataYacht, we prioritise ensuring a seamless transition from the old to the new system. We meticulously test the new setup to guarantee its reliability and performance before going live.

Service Level Agreement
At DataYacht, we offer Service Level Agreements (SLAs) that guarantee quality, availability, and responsibility for your data architecture. With our services, you can maintain a resilient data infrastructure that meets the needs of stakeholders while adhering to evolving requirements and regulations.

Training
DataYacht provides comprehensive training to equip your company with the necessary skills to utilize the data architecture effectively and implement robust data governance practices.

Description:

Collecte de données : Le BSATD réalise des campagnes de collecte de données via des enquêtes sur le terrain, des bases de données publiques et privées, ainsi que des capteurs numériques.
Traitement de données : Utilisation de langages de programmation (Python, R) pour nettoyer, organiser et structurer les données. Le bureau applique des techniques avancées de gestion des données pour garantir la qualité et l’intégrité des informations traitées.
Analyse et interprétation : Grâce à des outils comme Power BI, BSATD transforme les données en visualisations interactives, facilitant la prise de décision stratégique pour les entreprises. Les méthodes statistiques et l'intelligence artificielle sont également employées pour des analyses prédictives et descriptives.
Solutions sur mesure : BSATD développe des scripts et des tableaux de bord personnalisés pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques des clients, qu’il s’agisse d’analyse de marché, d’évaluation de projets, ou d'études sectorielles.
En combinant expertise technique et connaissance approfondie des besoins des entreprises, le Bureau Sénégalais d'Analyse et de Traitement de Données se positionne comme un acteur clé dans l'économie numérique et l'exploitation des données au Sénégal et en Afrique de l'Ouest.

Missão
Capacitar, inspirar e conectar mulheres na área de dados, criando um ambiente inclusivo e colaborativo que potencialize o crescimento pessoal e profissional, gere oportunidades reais e fortaleça a presença feminina no mercado.

Visão
Ser a maior referência em Angola e nos países lusófonos para o desenvolvimento e empoderamento de mulheres em dados, criando uma rede sólida e dinâmica que gere impacto positivo, promova a diversidade e construa pontes entre talento feminino e o mundo profissional.

Inclusão: Valorizamos a diversidade e criamos um ambiente em que todas se sintam bem-vindas e respeitadas.

Colaboração: Acreditamos que juntas somos mais fortes e que a partilha de conhecimento multiplica oportunidades.

Empoderamento: Incentivamos o crescimento pessoal e profissional, colocando as mulheres no centro das decisões.

Excelência: Buscamos qualidade em tudo o que fazemos das formações aos eventos e às oportunidades que criamos.

Transparência: Comunicamos de forma clara e aberta, reforçando a confiança e o senso de comunidade.

Our work integrates a 10% gross revenue-sharing model, decentralised seed libraries, ethical blockchain traceability, and regenerative tourism programmes, designed with and for the communities who carry this wisdom.

Our flagship expression is InnœRa, a ritual-based brand offering hand-crafted botanical infusions aligned to the body’s circadian rhythm. Each blend is grown, processed, and packed at source, using seed-embedded packaging that returns to the earth.

What We Do:
• Regenerative tea sourcing and cooperative production

Name: Layer
Description:
In the twenty-first century of tech and information, the practice of city management and urban planning often boils down to an obsolete set of unsubstantiated top-down verdicts with almost no correlation between decisions and desired outcomes. Layer changes that. We empower leaders in delivering cross-disciplinary change to the urban fabric. Our platform knits urban planning, architecture, urban economy, demography, mobility, infrastructure, municipal finances, technology, data and geographical information systems. Layer is a holistic urban management platform with a focus on urban planning orchestration. It is designed for cities of all sizes as a tool to help govern through tactics and patterns while leveraging data and artificial intelligence. It enables urban planners to balance the top down with the bottom up – putting options and design references at their fingertips. Layer attempts to serve as a mediating layer between communities, political appointees and civil servants by increasing institutional transparency and demolishing silos. We do not expect scientific rationalism to magically resolve the issues of cities anytime soon. But we can try to improve urban environments by putting state-of-the-art tools in the hands of mayors and public officials around the world.

Layer enables a sophisticated and interconnected overview of responsibilities, objectives and outcomes. It can transform communities from lethargic participants in tokenistic public consultations, to proactive agents of change – which access the deeper order of cities by excelling at community-driven local interventions. Layer enables a distributed but well-coordinated exercise in urban acupuncture which might allow cities to achieve the kind of local governance that might have a much higher impact on cities than current cartesian attempts of imposed order and legibility.

Name: Pixeltable
Description:
Pixeltable is a Python library providing a declarative interface for multimodal data (text, images, audio, video). It features built-in versioning, lineage tracking, and incremental updates, enabling users to store, transform, index, and iterate on data for their ML workflows.

Data transformations, model inference, and custom logic are embedded as computed columns.

- Load/Query all data types: Interact with video data at the frame level and documents at the chunk level
- Incremental updates for data transformation: Maintain an embedding index colocated with your data
- Lazy evaluation and cache management: Eliminates the need for manual frame extraction
- Integrates with any Python libraries: Use built-in and custom functions (UDFs) without complex pipelines
- Data format agnostic and extensibility: Access tables as Parquet files, PyTorch datasets, or COCO annotations

Get started at https://github.com/pixeltable/pixeltable

With many years of leadership experience within large companies in the construction industry, we know that there is so much change control and project data in a document management system.  

But ‘storing’ it is not the same as utilising it proactively for decision-making and improving performance. There had to be a smarter way to work. 

This drove us to develop AutoMutatio - a powerful digital tool for the construction and infrastructure sectors initially, as the ultimate e-discovery system.  

AutoMutatio merges and structures information from multiple sources to enable rapid understanding, analytics and appropriate action.  

In our role as Data Analytics Consultants, it is immensely satisfying to see Directors use our platform to be alerted to data triggers they have specified and gain insights to help them excel.  

You can use your data to increase value, reduce cost, reduce carbon and manage risk. There is simply too much data for people to process in real-time or even reasonable time. 

With Automutatio’s machine power, you can increase productivity x10.  

For example, you can quickly:  

- understand what language is trending on a project (eg the use of defects or delays),
- or what is not being talked about when it should be identify a project’s risk density at any given time quickly find out all the relevant information to resolve a dispute (e.g. in just over an hour 2500 diary sheets from 2 years were analysed to pick out key impacts ) gain awareness about issues to help avoid disputes and much more data to support requirements management and project.

Our Purpose - “To equip the world to find value in change.”

Name: Data Clean Room Alliance
Description:
Data Clean Rooms Alliance es la referencia agnóstica en España en divulgación, formación y desarrollo de casos de uso relacionados con los Data Clean Rooms (DCR). 

Nuestra misión es acelerar la comprensión, adopción y aplicación ética y legal de esta tecnología clave para el futuro del marketing online, la analítica y la privacidad de datos.

Desde una perspectiva neutral y educativa, promovemos el conocimiento sobre DCR a través de contenidos especializados, formaciones prácticas, colaboraciones con expertos del sector y un podcast que reúne voces líderes del ecosistema. Nos dirigimos tanto a profesionales técnicos como a perfiles de negocio y legales que buscan entender cómo los DCR pueden transformar la forma en que las organizaciones colaboran con datos sin comprometer la privacidad ni la seguridad.

En un entorno regulatorio cada vez más exigente y con la desaparición de las cookies de terceros, los Data Clean Rooms se posicionan como una solución estratégica para el intercambio seguro de datos entre empresas. En Data Clean Room Alliance ayudamos a desmitificar esta tecnología, conectamos a actores clave del mercado y fomentamos un diálogo abierto sobre sus implicaciones técnicas, legales y operativas.

 Visítanos en datacleanroom.es para acceder a recursos, eventos y oportunidades de colaboración.

• Deliver data your way. Open APIs, standard time series databases, and ready dashboards for your tools and models.
• Run the stack. Hosting, patching, monitoring, audit trails, and role based access in our private data centers.

Who we serve
• Owners and operators who need fleet wide visibility across vendors and sites.
• Service and O&M teams who want SLA aligned KPIs and fewer truck rolls.
• OEMs and tech suppliers who need filtered feeds for diagnostics and warranty.
• Finance, regulators, and analysts who need clean, audit ready data.

Why Phaseshift
• Open architecture with no lock in. You keep full ownership of your data.
• Industrial grade security from edge to cloud with least privilege access.
• Any asset and protocol on one normalized platform, from renewables to process plants.
• Fully managed service with design, deployment, monitoring, and 24x7 support.

Name: Escape The Cold Aisle

Our goal is to bring people together.

It is very simple -  Industry events are important however they are not conducive to building new relationships.   Thought leadership style events we all go to have very rigid agendas and most of the networking is relegated to 5 minutes in between panels,  buffet style lunches or happy hour bar settings.   These are great to high five people we already know but no new relationships are being created in our opinion.  Sponsors  sit at tables in the lobby or at  overpriced booths and regurgitate their value prop over and over and over to people rushing to the next panel session.  If you have been in business for over a year, chances are you have attended this style of event.   The challenge is how do you show a return on your dollar and time invested- stacks of business cards?  LinkedIN connections?  Impressive expense report with the names of attendees written on the top?

ETCA events are designed to bring people together to give them space and time to listen and develop mutually beneficial business relationships/friendships.  You have the freedom to curate and customize your involvement or build ecosystems of colleagues simply by showing up.  The return on  your time invested is you now have a colleague you can turn to for advice, invite to a meeting or send them business-  because now you know exactly what they do and what they are about.

ETCA is creating events people would attend even if it wasn’t for work.

Industry Thought Leadership events are valuable to further self-education and become enlightened.  We love to go these.  The Data Center and IT industries rely on solid partnerships and these partnerships are created from relationships that take time to build.  ETCA events expedite that process by curating an environment that is conducive to forming mutually beneficial business connections.

Name: Limetrack
Description:
Unavoidable commercial food waste is a 361.9Mt global problem, especially when that food waste ends up in landfills contributing to methane emissions. But separating food waste from general waste is a hassle, especially if it only makes up a small proportion. Collecting the separated food waste is inefficient and costly, and its destination is opaque. UK and EU legislation add a burden of being compliant to every hospitality and non-hospitality business - no matter the size - and providing reports in response to inevitable food waste audits is a headache.

Limetrack’s low-friction digital B2B food waste management platform eases that pain, ensuring that all businesses are fully compliant, that food waste is cost-effectively collected, tracked and processed, and that Scope 1 and Scope 3 emissions are reduced and accurately reported. Our ruthless pursuit of simplicity and compliance ensures success and supports every business’s journey to net zero.

Mit dem altosens.system bieten wir eine ganzheitlichen Lösung aus Hardware und Software für das Monitoring von Schraubverbindungen. Die altosens.disc erfasst die Vorspannkraft, Vibration und Temperatur in Echtzeit. Über altosens.analytics werden diese Daten lokal mit Edge AI verarbeitet und über die Cloud für kontinuierliche Analysen bereitgestellt. Damit ermöglichen wir eine zustandsorientierte und vorausschauende Wartung.
Da Schraubverbindungen für die Sicherheit und Verfügbarkeit technischer Systeme entscheidend ist - ob in Windkraftanlagen, Maschinen oder Infrastrukturen- sorgt Altosens für ihre automatisierte Überwachung: weniger Wartungsaufwand, keine ungeplanten Stillstände und ein effizienterer Personaleinsatz.
Das Ergebnis: geringere Betriebskosten, höhere Anlagenverfügbarkeit und mehr Sicherheit – nachhaltig und messbar.

Unsere langjährige Erfahrung und unser tiefes Verständnis der physischen Abläufe in Unternehmen, kombiniert mit einer starken Innovationskraft, machen uns zum idealen Partner für Ihre digitale Transformation. MARS skal være stedet, hvor man kan teste sine autonome løsninger, uanset om man er iværksætter, etableret virksomhed, forsknings- eller uddannelsesinstitution. Og hvor danske og udenlandske virksomheder kan slå sig ned og få værdi af, at være i et vidensmiljø, hvor fælles innovation, samarbejder og netværk går hånd i hånd.

Placeringen på Sydfyn er lige i hjertet på en region med en lang søfartstradition, en masse innovative virksomheder, stærke maritime uddannelser og et solidt maritimt netværk.

MARS er et EU-støttet projekt under det Fynske Fyrtårnsprojekt NextGen Robotics. SIMAC er leadpartner på projektet og projektgruppen er placeret i Svendborg. Øvrige partnere er Svendborg Kommune, Faaborg-Midtfyn Kommune, Ærø Kommune, MARNAV, Færgesekretariatet, SDU, Geodatastyrelsen og Søassurancen Danmark.

AiOpti works across tourism, retail, legal services, e-commerce, and franchise systems. Whether you’re a brand trying to optimize budget, an agency proving results to clients, or a DMO with high-stakes goals and limited time, AiOpti provides the clarity you need to act.

Marketers today are being asked to do more with less. Pressure is mounting to prove performance in a privacy-first world where many signals are disappearing. That’s why AiOpti integrates cleanly into your current martech stack or operates as a standalone solution. You can activate performance media, analyze customer spend, uncover audience trends, and track ROI from exposure to outcome, all in one place.

If your team is still relying on pieced-together platforms, outdated data, or agency PDFs to decide what’s working, AiOpti brings the clarity, control, and confidence you’ve been missing.

Know what works. Cut what doesn’t.

Name: Kindwell Inc
Description:
Our real-time chemical data analysis helps businesses to become more profitable.

Businesses lose significant amount of money annually due to chemical contamination impacting their products ... Kindwell can monitor, identify and remediate contaminants (VOCs & Inorganics) to improve product yield and product quality for customers.   

Kindwell's combination of measuring inorganics and VOCs near realtime combines for a robust solution measuring air quality as well.  And, with ongoing near realtime measurements, Kindwell has proven the ability to identify the source and quantity of the contaminants.  

Kindwell's GC is a portable, highly sensitive and broad-spectrum chemical detection and measurement system.

At single digit parts-per-trillion (ppt) sensitivity and C3-C17 range, Kindwell’s portable GC can detect and monitor a wide range of acids, bases, condensables and oxygenated chemical species and stream that data realtime to the cloud.

Differentiators:
No reagents needed
Ambient air as carrier gas
Clear separation of isomers
Broad range (c3-c17)
High sensitivity (ppt)
Variable high volume/throughput sampling
Network of devices monitoring both inside and outside 
Near realtime measurements 

Kindwell's Multi-pollutant Monitor can measure 13 parameters for inorganics.  This data combined with the VOC data provides robust analysis for customers.

Kindwell participates in the SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) Startup Program, a newly established SAP.iO startup accelerator program. The program supports us in leveraging the strengths of the SAP BTP and turning data into business value. Kindwell’s data insights will also be accessible via SAP Analytics Cloud , enabling SAP’s customers across industries to leverage real-time chemical measurements, drive predictive analytics and run their businesses to be more profitable and sustainable.

Description:
Founded in 1995, we are a team of meteorological data scientists providing online weather applications, data, insights and consultancy to over 90% of the UK insurance market.  We also offer bespoke services to industries such as legal, construction and forecasting.

Insurance
WeatherNet provides postcoded weather risk data for claims validation, mitigation and surge prediction for increasingly frequent severe weather. Our meteorological knowledge and expertise combined with our advanced weather data means even the most localised events are now detected. This benefits our insurers by reducing their weather-related indemnity spend, fast tracking valid claims and helping better identify fraudulent claims. We protect our clients’ reputation by ensuring customers are treated fairly throughout the industry.

TV & Film 
We are also home to Hollywood’s unofficial weatherman Dr Richard Wild! Dr Wild has worked on over 250 major TV series and films to ensure continuity between scenes. These include the Oscar-winning “1917”, and the Harry Potter and James Bond franchises. 

Legal
We provide legal weather reports, specialist analysis and expert witness interpretation to the legal profession and all those involved in criminal or civil litigation. WeatherNet can assist in all matters of forensic meteorology for the UK and worldwide and can produce CPR Legal Weather Reports, Non-CPR Legal Weather Reports and Certified Statements. 

Construction
Our data helps boost the bottom line on construction projects.  Bespoke site forecasts help accelerate safe progress on site whilst our historic weather data enables accurate tendering, supports claims for extension of time and verifies cases of damage, injury or spoilage.

Part of Claims Consortium Group, we are able to use our unique weather data assets and knowledge to help our clients and their customers make better-informed business decisions.

Data scattered across systems, conflicting definitions, and dashboard chaos slow teams down. Engineers drown in ad-hoc requests while non-technical teams wait, and leaders debate “which number is right?” instead of moving forward.
We built Edilitics to fix this - making data governed, explainable, and accessible to everyone.

Core Principles
AI-assisted, human-led: Guidance and context with humans in control
Governed by default: Roles, approvals, and audit trails built-in
Semantic layer: Standardized, reusable definitions across all tools
Decision latency is the metric: Faster questions → trusted answers
Interoperable and open: Integrates cleanly with your stack, no lock-in
Explainable outputs: Every AI-driven answer shows its sources and steps
Real-time observability: Monitored, resilient pipelines with self-healing

Our Platform
Integrate – Connect APIs, files, and warehouses seamlessly
Replicate – Real-time or incremental sync with built-in reliability
Transform – No-code prep for non-technical users, Python for power users
Visualize – Build decision-ready dashboards without SQL
AskEdi – Conversational, AI-assisted exploration backed by governance and transparency

Who We Serve
From operators to finance, growth, and analytics teams - everyone gains direct, governed access to consistent, trusted insights.

Name: FOSSR PROJECT
Description:
FOSSR aims to become an Italian Open Science Cloud, along the lines of the European Open Science Cloud project, in which to integrate innovative services developed by the project for data collection, data curation and Fairness, and data analysis on economic and societal change. 
FOSSR fosters the building of an integrated knowledge sharing platform, a single point of access to all the tools and services made available by the Italian nodes of social science infrastructures: ERIC CESSDA, ERIC SHARE and RISIS adopting the common theme of the development of Open Science in the Italian context with the goal of creating a framework of tools and services for the social science scholar community. This initiative is an investment to strengthen the digital capacities and the diffusion of advanced technologies in line with DESI4. 
FOSSR wants to promote toward multiple audiences, a widespread knowledge and awareness of the data and methodologies employed in empirical social science, fostering the growth of a broad societal environment favourable to further thriving of social science research in Italy, providing easy, open, streamlined access to social science data through innovative interfaces. The integration of this pool of resources shall concretely contribute to the realization of open science for scholars in social sciences, going with an important program of scientific training on methods and instruments for social science research based on FAIR empirical data.

2 simply add publicly available data in seconds via the chat interface, in order to see how the world impacts your data - powered by our GeoAI

Why are we building this?
Understanding geodata is pretty tough  especially for those who are not geoinformatics/data scientists. While some solutions address experienced GIS (geographic information system) experts, they also make it your new full time job due to their complexity.

Further, most teams and companies don’t have ALL the relevant data in-house they’d need to understand the geographic dependencies.
Our GeoAI solves this pain  you can now easily find additional data sets from publicly available sources and add them to your existing in-house data.

Right now, we start with infrastructure information,  but will add social and economical factors, too, as the next step. This way, it’s soooo much easier to understand the full picture, with basically no extra effort on your end. 

For whom are we building this?
Anyone who’d like to make more out of their location-based data. Specifically:
 Teams who don’t have their own GIS team, or maybe not even a data team, but want to take data-driven decisions
 Users who are just getting started with geo data and don’t need an expensive, highly complex GIS platform for professionals
 Users who struggle to find all the data they need in-house

Name: DS4M Mediterráneo
Description:
DS4M Mediterráneo (Data Space for Mobility) is an initiative promoted by the Ministerio para la Transformación Digital y de la Función Pública, funded by the European Next Generation EU programme as part of the Plan de Impulso de los Espacios de Datos Sectoriales. The project is led by the Instituto Universitario de Investigación en Tráfico y Seguridad Vial (INTRAS) of the University of Valencia, and it involves other key research centres from the same university, such as the Instituto de Robótica y Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones (IRTIC). It is also supported by major organisations in the mobility sector, including the Sistemas Inteligentes y de Transporte (ITS España).

The main objective of the project is to develop a mobility data platform for the Mediterranean Corridor that will:

1. Promote digital autonomy and data quality
2. Improve sustainable, efficient, and safe mobility
3. Facilitate and support the development of Access Points

The purpose of this project is to become a “demonstrator hub”—that is, a technological environment where business models based on data sharing can be tested, validated, and simulated through specific “use cases,” such as Sustainable Urban Mobility Plans (SUMPs), Metropolitan Mobility Plans (MMoPs), Regional Strategic Plans, and the implementation of Low-Emission Zones (LEZs).

To make this possible, collaboration from all stakeholders—public and private administrations and companies—will be essential, in order to contribute to improving mobility and ultimately enhancing citizens’ quality of life.

Name: Smart Environments
Description:
At Smart Environments, we are passionate about buildings. 

In 2021, the built environment accounted for nearly 40% of global CO₂ emissions and with the global population expected to rise to 9 billion by 2037, the importance of efficient building operations and systems has never been so important. 

The concept of Smart Environments was born in 2020 during the covid pandemic as a desire to innovate further within the BEMS and HVAC industries, with a particular focus on establishing a vendor agnostic approach to a building's systems, and align to the sustainability goals of organisations throughout the UK. 

We leverage over 40 years of successful HVAC and BEMS experience alongside new technologies to elevate how buildings perform. 

The challenges we face in maintaining the built environment are high, with internal spaces being regularly redefined, stakeholder changes, as well as demands to lower our energy usage and increased awareness in IAQ (indoor air quality). 

Therefore there are few environments as complex as commercial buildings. At times our buildings can support hundreds or even thousands of users, through which countless HVAC systems support the environmental wellbeing of its stakeholders. 

Our flexible AI technologies are able to be deployed to existing buildings, or as part of new construction projects and remove the problems faced by legacy infrastructure by normalising data from disparate systems and manufacturers. 

The benefits our smart building technologies deliver standardised reporting and alarms, fault detection and diagnosis, functional threshold testing, energy monitoring, analytical dashboards and ESOS & ESG requirements, and align to ISO50001.

Name: The Intangible Labs
Description:
Ask any operational leader—a division lead, or revenue officer, or the CEO —and they’ll tell you their biggest conflict. How they desperately need and want a culture of value creation. Yet, it’s rare. Elusive, even. They will each use different words, but point to the same blockers. How they must “focus” on making the business ever more efficient, instead of tapping the vast ingenuity of people. How they must divide big things into bite-sized bits to create “accountability” which results in siloed, separated, and specialized work, never collaborative enough to turn nascent ideas into robust viable ones. How they are asked to align almost entirely on quarterly profit instead of  aligning on what matters. 

It’s elusive and painful. 

Which is why we need new metrics. Today, value creation is measured as a residual; 80% of the value of the S&P500 is “intangible.” Intangible, not for lack of case studies and good ideas. But because we don’t have the cockpit dials to tell if we’re flying in the right direction. Metrics signal how things ought to be and what practices and processes should be used. Because metrics establish new feedback loops, they are at the crux of change. And while measuring the “intangibles” of value creation seems lofty, we know it’s been done before when we look at management history. For example, quality (TQM) and brand (NPS). 

Metrics of value creation. It’s doable. It’s needed. It’s time.  

Just as E-MC2 changed the world, it did not do so by answering all the questions, but by offering a new lens through which to ask better questions. TIL offers a new lens, a mathematical model, and related practice. So organizations (public, private, profit, non-profit, small, and large) can measure and thus tune the actions that create value for all their stakeholders.  As the name suggests, the goal is to create many learning labs while TIL will serve as a hub. Over time, insights will be codified into software, usable as an ESG standard.

This matters because most data platforms are drowning in unmaintainable hand-written SQL. Pipelines break constantly. Business logic lives in several different places, each implementation slightly wrong. Documentation drifts from reality quickly.

Daana encodes the knowledge that prevents this. The same shift happened with Infrastructure as Code and Kubernetes. Declare what you want, let proven patterns handle how.

The data architecture community built incredible knowledge over decades. Dimensional modeling, semantic layers, ensemble techniques. This is our attempt to make sure the next generation can access it, without needing a decade of experience first.

Deploying compute power to unlock the value of massive data:-
While capacity growth of the centralised cloud isn’t slowing down any time soon, the unlocking of high-speed access through fibre and 5G means many data-intensive, latency-sensitive applications are now best handled at the digital edge. Growth of edge compute is one of the most important enablers of data-intensive applications, combining with other key building blocks such as IoT, public cloud, 5G and AI.  Clarke Connect’s experience in these technologies supports our clients in enabling the best data centre architecture, optimally balancing fixed and mobile connectivity, and locating compute most efficiently to unlock technical and business value.

Esta plataforma, está abierta a cuantas personas y colectivos deseen participar, exceptuando a organizaciones políticas, sea cual sea su naturaleza.

La iniciativa sorgeix d’un grup d’apassionats de la cultura i la ciència de dades de la comarca d’Osona que hem trobat a faltar una comunitat que posi en contacte les persones interessades en aquests temes. Volem que Vic Data, grup sense ànim de lucre, sigui aquesta comunitat!

Ser el punt de trobada multidisciplinar per compartir experiències i coneixements sobre la cultura i la ciència de dades entre persones de la comarca d'Osona i rodalies.

- Sessions periòdiques de formació i difusió de coneixement sobre la cultura i la ciència de dades.
- Difusió de formacions, cursos i ofertes de treball relacionats amb la cultura i la ciència de dades.
- Col·laboració en projectes sense ànim de lucre que relacionin dades i territori.

Obert a tot el públic interessat en la cultura i la ciència de dades, siguin professionals, aficionats o estudiants. Els assistents tindran accés gratuït als esdeveniments que s’organitzin.

Name: OzeanAI
Description:
The maritime industry is a critical driver of the global economy, responsible for transporting the vast majority of the world's trade. However, the sector faces numerous challenges that impact operational efficiency, profitability, and sustainability for ship owners and operators. These challenges include maritime safety, port efficiency, fuel and lubricant costs, maintenance and repair expenses, trade route optimization, crew management, and delivery optimization. Addressing these complex issues requires innovative solutions that can adapt to the ever-changing landscape of the maritime industry.

MariApps Marine Solutions Private Limited recognizes the need for cutting-edge technologies to transform the maritime sector and has established OzeanAI in January 2022 to focus on artificial intelligence and machine learning projects. OzeanAI is committed to developing and implementing AI-driven solutions addressing the critical challenges of ship owners and operators. Our focus areas include enhancing maritime safety, optimizing port operations, reducing fuel and lubricant costs, minimizing maintenance and repair expenses, identifying the most profitable trade routes, improving crew management, and optimizing delivery processes. By empowering the maritime industry with innovative solutions, OzeanAI aims to achieve greater efficiency, profitability, and sustainability.

With our comprehensive scope and MariApps' expertise in the maritime industry, OzeanAI is poised to become a leading force in revolutionizing the sector. By harnessing the potential of AI-driven solutions, we strive to contribute to a more prosperous and environmentally responsible future for the maritime industry and the global economy.

The MQ Terminal is designed as the intermediary layer between NFT participants (lenders, borrowers, traders) and the NFT Financialization Protocols (NFTFi). Our platform functions as an NFTFi Aggregator, offering users a robust analytical and lending/trading infrastructure to allocate liquidity to various NFTFi primitives.

We streamline the research and strategy development phase for liquidity providers by consolidating data such as competitiveness of APRs across protocols & collections, borrowed/repaid capital amounts, liquidations, as well as real-time updates (e.g., LTV, HF) on outstanding loans and monitoring of wallet activity.

Additionally, we route traffic to NFTFi Protocols that are integrated with us by enabling the direct execution of strategies in the following verticals: NFT Lending (Pine Protocol, OpenSky Finance, Sodium), Perpetual DEXs (Tribe3, NFTperp), Options (Wasabi Protocol), as well as Liquidity Provision (Protectorate Protocol).

Our primary value proposition is delivering an advanced infrastructure for NFTFi that facilitates users' decision-making process through alpha generating analytics and allows for the seamless execution of NFTFi strategies across protocols via our platform.

Name: Digital Strategy Group (DSG)
Description:
The Offshore Energy Digital Strategy Group (DSG) launched in July 2022 with the stated goal of maximising the potential of the North Sea by bringing together leading organisations to combine their data and digital efforts. 

The DSG was set up to implement the key recommendations of theDigitalising Offshore Energy Systemsreport, published by Energy Systems Catapult, of which the first was to set-up an industry-wide group. 

The other three main recommendations were: 

Unifying data principles - drive the adoption of a data management framework across the offshore energy sector.

Delivering a common data toolkit -Establish a common data toolkit to facilitate controlled and automated data sharing across the sector 

Driving Cross-sector Digitalisation -Coordinate digitalisation efforts to enable efficient investment and capture cross-sector requirements 

The DSG is chaired by the North Sea Transition Authority (NSTA) with membership from Crown Estate Scotland, Marine Management Organisation, the Marine Scotland Directorate of the Scottish Government, Ofgem and The Crown Estate. 

It is supported by contributors from Energy Systems Catapult, NZTC, OEUK, Open Data Institute, Offshore Renewable Energy Catapult, Offshore Wind Innovation Hub, RenewableUK, BGS and Technology Leadership Board. 

To begins its work shaping the future of the North Sea, it set up three Task Groups: 

- Data Principles Task Group 
- Common Data Toolkit Task Group 
- Driving Cross-Sector Digitalisation Task Group

Name: ConnectedCompute
Description:
More than ever, efficient and productive digital infrastructure is critical to the development trajectory of emerging and developed nations. Data centres are one central component, hosting the online applications and content that enterprises and consumers alike interact with every second of the day. Data centres need to be accompanied by a series of other elements to realise the targeted benefits. Subsea cables, IXPs, transit zones, terrestrial long-haul and metro connectivity and localised “hubs” to provide internet access in rural areas are some examples of these critical elements. 

At ConnectedCompute, we have an in-depth understanding of these elements and the bridges that need to exist between them. Our senior team has for many years been working to bring these pieces together in countries across the world. Our focus today is on select markets in Europe, West and East Africa, and the Middle East. Our relationships span decision-makers and experts at the highest level, and we thrive on joining critical dots and making things happen. We take pride in delivering what we say we are going to deliver. 

We are currently working on digital infrastructure projects involving brick & mortar data centre projects in multiple locations, a modular data centre deployment for Govt private cloud deployments across a country, and rural e-Hubs for distributed access to eGovt services and digital education in multiple countries.

Name: OCN.ai
Description:
OCN.ai is revolutionizing the way we understand and protect our oceans. Much like a Fitbit measures health metrics for individuals, OCN.ai measures critical oceanic data, effectively serving as a health tracker for the marine environment. Our mission is to harness the power of innovative technology, data analytics, and machine learning to provide real-time, actionable insights into marine health, with a special focus on blue carbon ecosystems.

We work with an array of sensors and data points, some deployed by our team and some collected from various sources, including local communities, divers, and partner organizations. However, where we truly shine is in the analysis and interpretation of this data. Our machine learning algorithms, trained against the knowledge of published marine scientists, crunch these vast datasets into easily digestible and visually appealing narratives.

Our work empowers governments, environmental agencies, research institutes, and businesses to make informed, data-driven decisions. Whether it's enhancing guests' experiences at diving resorts, promoting sustainable tourism, informing policy implementations, or understanding carbon sequestration capabilities of marine ecosystems for blue finance, we provide the data and insights needed.

Moreover, our engagement with citizen scientists fosters an increased awareness of marine conservation, driving positive change from the grassroots level. By turning each dive into a data collection opportunity, we not only enrich the diving experience but also contribute to a larger purpose - the health of our oceans.

OCN.ai is more than a platform; it's a movement towards a healthier, more resilient ocean, setting the benchmark for blue carbon and marine conservation efforts worldwide. Our vision is to create a data-rich, transparent, and connected ocean that aids global marine conservation and drives a transformative blue economy.

Name: Naabhik Solutions
Description:
Approach :-
With the need for adaptability, innovation, and agility, companies move away from monolithic ERP applications to headless application architecture. This means that the same data object (i.e. product, consumer) exists in multiple applications with their own definitions, sources, and business functionality. This means that the data definitions remain "locked" in individual systems and there is no centralized repository for data definitions.

Furthermore, the amount of data is growing rapidly each day thus increasing its complexity. The challenge that most enterprises face today is how to understand and efficiently manage this goliath of data that can span multiple applications.

This is largely restraining enterprises from delivering on flexibility, innovation, customer-centricity, and the use of digital capabilities to drive growth.

Naabhik removes these obstacles by providing a toolset and data solution framework that helps enterprises to create a reliable logical data architecture that is easy to understand. This allows enterprises to create living and breathing artefacts enabling them to be much more responsive as time goes by.

By helping enterprises understand their data, Naabhik enables them to identify architectural moves in the strangler fig method. This will give value unlocks in the present while building for the future, and create clarity and understanding throughout the enterprise towards What is data? Where is it? How is it accessible? Etc.

Naabhik helps enterprises gain central governance over data which in turn enables them to gain insights to innovate and develop customer-centric products and services.

What we do: We unify the entire speech chain behind a single API. We offer plug‑and‑play AI agents for contact centres, a browser‑first meeting translator with lip‑sync and voice cloning, and website avatars that answer questions from your own data. An optional speech‑to‑sign‑language overlay is on our roadmap. 

Who we serve: SaaS startups, telcos and public services that need multilingual support without hiring extra engineers. Developers who want to build voice experiences with one endpoint. Teams that care about speed, accuracy and accessibility. Our consumption‑based pricing keeps costs predictable, and on‑premise deployment is planned for organisations with strict data‑sovereignty requirements. 

Why it matters: When conversations flow naturally, customers stay, employees win and businesses grow. We’re committed to inclusive design, data privacy and building technology that helps humans connect. If you share that vision, follow us and explore how SentiVue can make your next conversation seamless.

Name: iPractitioner.io
Description:
Based on experience from handling some of the most high profile and cross-border insolvency cases in Denmark, including Cimber Sterling, E.Pihl & Søn, Primera Air and Top-Toy, we are intimately familiar with the shortcomings of the traditional way of conduction insolvency related investigations, i.e. using the standard Office suite.

Having experienced first hand the effects of using the Office Suite in this manner - which in fairness to Microsoft is not how it was intended to be used - motivated us to start utilizing actual data-science tools specifically designed for data processing and visualization.

Practitioner.io is an online platform containing cutting edge tools tailored to insolvency practitioners’ investigations.

If you've ever stared at a massive spreadsheet with thousands or even millions of rows you know it's near impossible to quickly spot any trends or outliers, because you’re subjected to information overload.

However, when we see the same data presented in a graph we quickly see trends and outliers. If we can see something we internalise it quickly - it's storytelling with a purpose - it's examining the data in context.

Insolvency investigations should also cover email data, and the old fashioned way to review such data is wildly inefficient and error prone and therefore a very costly experience.

NO MORE. iPractitioner.io provides the tools to speed up the email review process by a factor of thousands (!), gives you an instant overview of the email flow through the innovative graph based interface, and lets you focus your efforts on only reviewing the emails that are relevant. These tools are not insolvency specific, and are relevant for any lawyer conducting investigations involving email data.

iPractitioner.io presents data in interactive graphs so that you may start your investigations with a bird's-eye view instead of the traditional ground level view, thereby empowering you to take data-driven decisions on how to proceed with the case.

SmartEasy – студия бизнес-аналитики

Мы помогаем компаниям принимать решения на основе данных, а не интуиции. Настраиваем BI-системы, автоматизируем отчётность, создаём дашборды, чтобы владельцы и топ-менеджеры видели всю картину бизнеса на одном экране.

Почему мы крутые?
 Опыт и экспертиза – наши решения уже используют компании в ритейле, IT, SaaS, производстве. Мы не просто собираем отчёты, а помогаем клиентам понять, какие данные реально важны.
 Быстро и эффективно – работаем по Agile, показываем результат каждые 1–2 недели.
 Гибкость и масштабируемость – аналитика адаптируется под бизнес клиента, а не наоборот.
 От идеи до внедрения – берём на себя всё: от выгрузки данных до визуализации и бизнес-анализа.

Наша амбициозная цель
Мы строим не просто BI-компанию, а новый стандарт работы с данными в бизнесе. Создаём Analytics as a Service (AAaS) – готовую инфраструктуру, где компания получает аналитику без необходимости содержать внутренних специалистов.

Для кого мы?
 Если у вас много данных, но мало понимания, что с ними делать – поможем.
 Автоматизируем отчёты – без ручных расчётов и Excel-хаоса.
 Дашборды в реальном времени – все ключевые показатели бизнеса перед глазами.
 Выявим точки роста, поможем снизить расходы и увеличить прибыль.

Мы за data-driven культуру, где бизнес перестаёт гадать и начинает принимать точные решения.

Name: MAMA-MIA Challenge
Description:
The MAMA-MIA Challenge at MICCAI 2025 is an international competition designed to advance AI-driven breast cancer research. Leveraging the largest publicly available breast DCE-MRI dataset with expert-validated segmentations, MAMA-MIA focuses on developing ethical, generalizable, and clinically useful AI models for breast cancer diagnosis and treatment response prediction.

Why Participate?

 Work with a Unique Dataset – 1,506 pre-treatment DCE-MRI scans, expert-segmented tumors, and clinical variables.

 Tackle Real-World Challenges – Develop AI models for tumor segmentation & treatment response prediction.

 Ensure AI Generalizability – Models will be evaluated across diverse clinical settings for robustness.

 Recognition & Prizes – Present at MICCAI 2025, win cash prizes, and contribute to a summary publication.

Challenge Details

 Event Dates: September 23-27, 2025 |  Location: South Korea (MICCAI 2025)
 Website: https://www.ub.edu/mama-mia/
 Sign-up Deadline: June 1, 2025

 Join the MAMA-MIA Challenge and help shape the future of AI in breast cancer imaging!

Description:
MORF is our 'Multi-Omics Research Factory', a web-based platform for visualising complex biological data. MORF holds Big Data from fermentations, 'omics analysis and metabolic models. Focussing on microbial systems, our bioinformaticians can build a bespoke, password protected project in MORF for you and your team to interrogate your data. If the data is published, it can be made available to the community through MORF, so they can easily interpret it too, adding value to your work.  
Built for strain improvement in Industrial Biotechnology, MORF gives researchers without programming expertise the ability to identify genes of interest for engineering biology. 
Fermentation data can be made easily accessible through MORF, so ongoing fermentations can be quickly compared with historic data, saving wasted resource in failed batches. Scaling up bioprocesses is simplified by comparing data from microplate readers to production scale fermentations through our web based platform.
We offer different levels of bioinformatics service to suit your needs. Our bioinformaticians can process your raw data and create a bespoke project for you to analyse the results. Or we can help you to process the data and we'll upload it to MORF for you to share with your team, or the community. Projects can be securely held or made open to disseminate data from publications. 
Get in touch today to find out how we can help you get more from your data!
