Name: Agrolytix-data
Description:
Agrolytix – Datos que cultivan decisiones inteligentes

En Agrolytix desarrollamos soluciones de agricultura de precisión impulsadas por inteligencia artificial, diseñadas para ayudar a fincas, cooperativas y empresas del sector agroalimentario a optimizar su producción y rentabilidad. Nuestro ecosistema combina análisis predictivo, datos climáticos y de suelo, y modelos avanzados de machine learning para ofrecer un asesoramiento personalizado y accionable.

Nuestra propuesta se apoya en varios ejes clave. El primero es una red neuronal predictiva y agrupadora que analiza datos de múltiples fincas y permite identificar patrones de éxito o fracaso en condiciones similares, ofreciendo recomendaciones prácticas para mejorar la eficiencia. El segundo es Agrolytix PriceMaps, una herramienta que facilita la visualización de precios agrícolas en tiempo real para que los productores puedan tomar decisiones más inteligentes en la comercialización de sus productos. A medio plazo, incorporaremos un gemelo digital interactivo que permitirá a los agricultores simular cambios en su finca y prever el impacto en productividad, costes y beneficios antes de aplicarlos en la realidad. Todo esto se integra en una plataforma SaaS modular, accesible desde cualquier dispositivo y adaptable a diferentes perfiles, desde pequeños productores hasta grandes cooperativas e instituciones.

Con Agrolytix, los agricultores obtienen una visión integral de su explotación basada en datos y no solo en intuiciones. Esto les permite reducir riesgos, aumentar la eficiencia y mejorar la sostenibilidad de sus prácticas. Nuestra misión es democratizar el acceso a la inteligencia artificial en el campo, creando un puente entre tecnología y agricultura para impulsar una nueva generación de decisiones más rentables, sostenibles y basadas en evidencia.

L’obbiettivo è quello di osservare lo stato di salute delle piante di specifiche colture agronomiche e dunque, supportare le aziende agricole in un’efficiente predizione e gestione delle risorse ambientali, incrementando sia la produttività che la qualità del prodotto rendendola maggiormente sostenibile.
	
	Industriale: 
Prospecto Srl propone Consulenze Tecniche su specifici problemi in ambito Industriale o dell’Automazione risolvibili tramite lo sviluppo di soluzioni sia Hardware che Software. 
Hardware, tramite lo sviluppo, la progettazione o l’integrazione di un sensore o di un sistema di essi.
Software attraverso la realizzazione di algoritmi di analisi dati e modelli previsionali che sfruttino logiche di intelligenza artificiale, personalizzati in base alla specifica esigenza.

Name: GLACIS Technologies
Description:
GLACIS is AI Policy Enforcement Infrastructure.
We don't observe AI systems — we enforce governance at runtime and generate cryptographic proof that it actually happened.
When regulators ask "were your safety controls running?", most companies can only offer logs and promises. GLACIS provides tamper-evident receipts: Ed25519 signatures, Merkle tree anchoring, deterministic serialization. Mathematical evidence, not documentation.

Zero-Egress Architecture
GLACIS infrastructure runs at your edge—inside your VPC, your compliance boundary. We enforce policies inline. We only see hashes.

→ No BAA required (we never process PHI)
→ No data processing agreements (we don't touch PII)
→ No new attack surface (sensitive data never leaves your environment)

Enterprise AI teams get the compliance evidence they need without the procurement friction of granting a vendor access to sensitive data.

The Category
Observability tools watch passively and require data access. Governance platforms document policies but don't enforce them. Audit processes sample retrospectively.

GLACIS is different: we're inline (in the hot path), we enforce (not just observe), and we prove (cryptographically, not just logging).

Think of us as the flight recorder for enterprise AI—irrefutable evidence of what happened at the moment of inference.

Why Now
EU AI Act (August 2026), Colorado AI Act (June 2026), and emerging state regulations require organizations to demonstrate AI governance with evidence, not promises. Insurance underwriters are beginning to price AI risk—and they need verifiable signals.

GLACIS provides the infrastructure to meet these requirements.

Backed by AI2 Incubator | Seattle, WA

We're hiring Rust engineers and accepting design partners in healthcare and fintech.
→ careers@glacis.io
→ glacis.io

Name: Joint Cetacean Data Programme (JCDP)
Description:
The Joint Cetacean Data Programme (JCDP) facilitates access to quality, standardised cetacean survey data collected from aerial and vessel platforms. By collating effort-related cetacean survey data into a single accessible resource, the JCDP is filling information gaps to help better understand trends in cetacean abundance and distribution. 
This collaborative project is governed by a dedicated working group of the International Council for the Exploration of the Sea (ICES), and benefits from advice and expertise from stakeholders across industry, policy, academia and NGO sectors. 
An online Data Portal hosted in the ICES Data Centre allows people to submit, search and download cetacean survey data. It is complimented by the JCDP Information Hub, a ‘one-stop-shop’ giving information about the project, resources to help data submitters and users, and guidance on how to design high quality cetacean surveys.
The JCDP data standard and set of guidelines for cetacean survey design ensure that the data are of high quality and can be collated easily. Each dataset has associated metadata records, essential for effective use of data.

And did we mention elastic, shared computing resources? Imagine having the power at your fingertips, precisely when you need it. AnVIL is not just a platform; it's a revolution in genomics, opening doors to seamless collaboration and discovery. 

AnVIL is not a solo act; it's a symphony of collaboration! A brainchild of the Broad Institute, Johns Hopkins University, Vanderbilt University Medical Center, and more, AnVIL is a melting pot of expertise and innovation. Check out our stellar team at https://anvilproject.org/team.

Everest is the technology and digital identity company working to address this gap by deploying Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) to empower individual service providers, governments, foundations, and the individuals they serve. 

For service providers, Everest offers a software platform to better know their clients, record transactions, and access reports in seconds. We allow them to partner with each other, securely share data, and collaborate in how they support individuals and families. Our goal is to make it easy for people to navigate and access services, empower providers to offer more proactive social care, and ultimately help individuals achieve better health and life outcomes.

Company Background
Founded in 2016 and headquartered in Fishers, Indiana, WPR Services began as a technical services company and has since evolved to offer advanced manufacturing solutions . The company leverages data infrastructure and analytics to improve operational efficiency and safety in industrial environments .

Core Services and Solutions
WPR Services focuses on the integration of hardware and software to create a complete Manufacturing Experience System (MES) platform, branded as POWtalk. Our solutions include:

•	Data Gathering and Analysis: Collect video, audio, machine metrics, and employee interaction data to analyze manufacturing processes .
•	Digital Twin Technology: Use machine learning to create digital replicas of factory floors, allowing predictive monitoring and prescriptive actions to improve safety and efficiency .
•	Custom Hardware and Software Modules: Modular systems can be fully configured and installed to suit specific manufacturing facility needs, providing scalable monitoring and performance optimization .
•	Machine Learning and Predictive AI: POWtalk leverages AI to identify process inefficiencies, safety risks, and production bottlenecks, allowing data-driven decision-making .
•	Employee Engagement and Training Tools: Platforms are designed to enhance transparency and collaboration on the factory floor, including automated alerts and training modules .

Industry Focus and Impact
Primarily serving the manufacturing industry, WPR Services’ offerings are designed to improve safety, maintenance, quality control, and production efficiency . Our patented systems allow manufacturers to scale advanced technology adoption at their own pace, creating measurable ROI by integrating digital and physical processes seamlessly.

Description:

A radically distributed approach, where data is visited and queried at the source, will be an essential characteristic of this ecosystem. LIFES will serve as a catalyst for removing unnecessary barriers to equitable data visiting for legitimate research questions that meet legal, ethical, and consent requirements. 

LIFES addresses the challenges of global data reuse by building a wide and diverse network of public and private members that want to incorporate the principles of FAIR (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable) and equitable data reuse. 

It will coordinate a strong, coherent FAIR-compliant application and services offering for training, data stewardship, analytics/machine learning and infrastructure. LIFES will broker access to these services, stimulate collaborations to fill technological and methodological gaps, and take the lead in securing public and private funding for developing strategic capabilities.

Description:
MORF is our 'Multi-Omics Research Factory', a web-based platform for visualising complex biological data. MORF holds Big Data from fermentations, 'omics analysis and metabolic models. Focussing on microbial systems, our bioinformaticians can build a bespoke, password protected project in MORF for you and your team to interrogate your data. If the data is published, it can be made available to the community through MORF, so they can easily interpret it too, adding value to your work.  
Built for strain improvement in Industrial Biotechnology, MORF gives researchers without programming expertise the ability to identify genes of interest for engineering biology. 
Fermentation data can be made easily accessible through MORF, so ongoing fermentations can be quickly compared with historic data, saving wasted resource in failed batches. Scaling up bioprocesses is simplified by comparing data from microplate readers to production scale fermentations through our web based platform.
We offer different levels of bioinformatics service to suit your needs. Our bioinformaticians can process your raw data and create a bespoke project for you to analyse the results. Or we can help you to process the data and we'll upload it to MORF for you to share with your team, or the community. Projects can be securely held or made open to disseminate data from publications. 
Get in touch today to find out how we can help you get more from your data!

At Griffith University and RIDL we leverage research expertise across all projects to ensure they are executed with scientific rigour. 
We have identified 4 programs of work which allow us to effectively and efficiently support communities across Australia:
1.  Equip place-based mission-led organisations with data
2.  Create data capability within communities
3.  Advance transdisciplinary research
4.  Establish and support data collaboratives (reach out if you want to collaborate)

A little data can go a long way when it’s put into the hands of committed communities. Name: AlexMind
Description:
AlexMind (Powered by Alexandria Lab) is a next-generation AI analytics platform designed to help organizations work with complex data at scale and transform it into clear, explainable, and actionable intelligence.

The platform connects data from multiple sources — CRM, ERP, cloud systems, databases, marketplaces, and internal tools — into a unified analytical environment. AlexMind goes beyond traditional BI and reporting by focusing on deep analytical reasoning, causal relationships, anomaly detection, and scenario-based decision intelligence.

At its core, AlexMind operates as an AI-driven orchestration layer powered by intelligent agents. These agents work together as a digital analytical team: analyzing data, validating insights, synthesizing conclusions, and generating clear recommendations for decision-makers. Organizations can also create custom corporate agents trained on their own data, documentation, and domain knowledge, forming a persistent organizational memory that improves over time.

AlexMind is built as a modular and extensible platform. Companies can activate only the capabilities they need, integrate industry-specific modules, and extend the system through an open marketplace and API layer. If a required module does not exist, the platform can automatically structure requirements and initiate development workflows through an integrated tender system.

The platform is designed for enterprise, public sector, and high-complexity environments, with flexible deployment options including cloud, private cloud, hybrid, and on-premise setups. AlexMind supports secure data isolation, auditability, and compliance with regulatory requirements, making it suitable for finance, healthcare, industry, smart cities, education, sports, and government use cases.

Name: MStats
Description:
En tant qu'indépendante, j'accompagne et je forme chercheuse-re-s et entreprises dans l'analyse et la valorisation de leurs données avec R.

Qui fait appelle à moi ?
 Des personnes qui ont récoltés des données qu'elles ne savent pas les valoriser ou qui veulent faire vérifier les analyses réalisées
 Des entreprises qui travaillent sur R et ont un soucis avec un ou plusieurs scripts
 Des personnes qui ont récoltés des données pendant une expérience et qui ont eu des soucis : données manquantes, plan expérimentale non croisé,...
 Des entreprises qui utilisent déjà R mais qui veulent automatiser ou rendre plus efficaces leurs scripts
 Des thésard-e-s ou étudiant-e-s en master qui veulent se former à l'analyse de données

Pourquoi me faire confiance ?
 Ce que j'aime c'est accompagner individuellement les personnes afin qu'elles deviennent autonomes dans la valorisation de leurs données.
 Après un cursus d'ingénieure agronome et un master recherche en écologie j'ai travaillé cinq années dans la recherche publique en universités en tant que maitresse de conférences contractuelle.
 Je me suis ensuite ouverte au monde de la data d'entreprise d'abord en tant que data scientist dans le privé et maintenant en tant qu'indépendante.
 Rédactrice d'un blog de statistiques et R (actuellement en PLS), j'utilise R depuis plus de 10 ans.

Comment cela se passe ?
 Vous me contactez en me donnant un minimum d'informations : type de besoin, votre niveau, type de données...
 On bloque un créneau visio d'une demi-heure gratuit pour discuter
 On fait le point pour savoir si on bosse ensemble et si oui, les modalités associés

Comment me contacter ?
 LinkedIn
 marie.vaugoyeau@gmail.com
 06.77.01.74.87

What “engineering + artistry” looks like in practice:
Architecture first, then aesthetics. We start by shaping your data model and integration patterns so the system is stable, observable, and cost‑sane. Only then do we move into interfaces and automation that people actually enjoy using.

Prototypes that breathe. Early in an engagement you will see working software, not slideware. We test with real users and real data. Feedback guides the next iteration.

Documentation people will read. Every build ships with concise runbooks and diagrams that your team can maintain. Plain language over jargon.
Change as a feature. We design for the pace of modern data and AI. Pipelines evolve, models drift, org charts change. Your system should welcome that reality, not fight it.

Boutique on purpose:
We are not trying to be the biggest agency in the room. We compete with large firms yet we choose a different posture.

Fewer clients, deeper partnerships. You work directly with senior engineers and architects. No layers of handoffs.

Teams that fit the problem. We assemble a small A‑team for each engagement. Everyone knows the business goal, not just their ticket.

Speed without drama. Lean governance. Clear scopes. Weekly outcomes you can touch.

Tool‑agnostic delivery. We recommend the stack that fits your constraints and skills. Cloud, open source, or enterprise. Your roadmap comes first.

Name: Dataracity Inc
Description:
Dataracity was born out of one simple truth we kept running into, businesses are drowning in data but starving for clarity. We’d walk into projects where critical reports took weeks, sometimes months, to pull together and where important decisions were being made on spreadsheets nobody fully trusted. We knew it didn’t have to be that way.

Between us, we have more than 25 years of experience working with Microsoft Business Intelligence. We’ve built data warehouses from the ground up, wrestled with messy datasets, and delivered urgent reports on impossible deadlines. What we realized is, this is where we thrive. We love bringing order to the chaos, creating platforms that make life easier, and watching teams feel confident in the data in front of them.

Our roots are in Microsoft BI technologies, backed by strong skills in SQL and python. That means we don’t just build systems, we design platforms tailored to how each business really works. From modeling data so analysts can move faster, to optimizing environments so companies save time and money, our focus is always on creating solutions that work in the real world, not just on paper.

From the very beginning, we’ve held to a simple philosophy: best practices aren’t an afterthought, they’re the foundation. By building with scalability, transparency, and efficiency in mind, we create platforms that not only perform today but are easy to maintain and ready to grow tomorrow.

Today, we’re helping clients modernize on the cloud, moving into Microsoft Fabric, Azure Synapse, and Databricks. Whether it’s migrations, modern lakehouse architectures, or enabling self-service BI, our goal is the same: to help decision-makers act sooner, analysts work faster, and businesses run smarter.

At the end of the day, Dataracity exists because we believe data should be an advantage, not a burden. And we’re proud to be the team that makes that happen.

Name: Dati365
Description:
La tua routine quotidiana per diventare un esperto di Data Analytics

Descrizione dell’azienda:

Dati 365 è il percorso formativo pensato per chi vuole diventare un professionista della Data Analytics attraverso un metodo innovativo, efficace e sostenibile.
Ogni giorno, dal lunedì al venerdì, gli studenti ricevono contenuti sintetici, pratici e ad alto valore aggiunto, progettati per sviluppare competenze reali e durature.

A differenza dei corsi tradizionali, Dati 365 si basa su un approccio fondato sull’apprendimento attivo e continuo, per trasformare la formazione in una vera e propria abitudine quotidiana.

Il nostro metodo:

 Apprendimento pratico e basato sull’azione
Ogni modulo si fonda su esercizi pratici, progettati per massimizzare la retention delle informazioni, secondo i principi della Piramide dell’Apprendimento di Dale, che dimostra come “fare” e “insegnare ad altri” siano le forme più efficaci per interiorizzare concetti complessi.

 Microlearning
I contenuti sono sintetici, focalizzati su un solo concetto alla volta, e strutturati per poter essere fruiti in pochi minuti al giorno.
Questo approccio consente di mantenere alta la concentrazione, migliorare la memorizzazione e rendere l’apprendimento compatibile con la vita professionale.

 Casi di business realistici
Ogni settimana parte da un caso aziendale ispirato alla realtà, per sviluppare competenze su problemi concreti e abituarsi a ragionare come un analista. Gli studenti non imparano solo "come si fa", ma soprattutto "perché" e "quando" applicare ogni tecnica.

 Formazione su più tool e linguaggi
Il percorso tocca tutti i principali strumenti della moderna data analytics:

Excel avanzato per l’analisi
Power BI e DAX per la Business Intelligence
Power Query per la trasformazione dei dati
SQL per l’interrogazione
Python e Machine Learning per analisi predittiva
Data Storytelling per comunicare gli insight con impatto

Name: Lifemesh Corp
Description:
Why Rapid Hypothesis Testing via Experimental Learning is the future of behavior influence.

Industry standard experimentation platforms such as Optimizely and Google Optimize feature sophisticated A/B testing functionality as the primary driver to unlocking additional customer value through highly personalized interactions. In the hands of the right marketing team, these platforms are central to robust and highly repeatable experimentation that ultimately create new and enhanced customer experiences.

Indeed, the right marketing team is chasing hyper-personalization in 2022. Their segmentations are dynamic to behaviors across a wide variety of both online and offline channels that change by the day. They can engage a sophisticated customer group with rapidly changing wants and needs because relevant customers insights are consistently made available to them. Unfortunately, the typical marketing team in 2022 is likely to use outdated segmentations that contain undifferentiating customer dimensions. Experimentation platforms of today still offer no solution in answering the "who" of customer engagement, while answering the "how" and the "what".

Leveraging modern AI technology, HELP is designed to help marketing teams rapidly experiment so they can achieve their business goals quicker. This is possible through automated insights that guide which customer attributes have a high affinity to an offer or engagement, and which customer attributes can be safely ignored. By enabling rapid iterations of intelligently selected customer attribution, tailoring customer engagement becomes much easier for the typical marketing team.

Clinical coding underpins healthcare data, driving funding, research, planning, and patient safety. Yet, the profession faces a shortage of qualified coders, limited career development, and rapid technological change. The CCLN addresses these issues by promoting knowledge sharing, advocacy, and professional growth.

We unite coders at all levels: trainees, auditors, trainers, Heads of Coding, aspirant Heads of Clinical Coding as well as key stakeholders.

Our values:

excellence,

collaboration,

integrity,

patient-centred care

Our mission:

Coders are essential to healthcare’s digital future and deserve recognition, support, and leadership opportunities.


Members benefit from webinars, workshops, mentorship, and working groups on AI, education, and governance. Whether you’re seeking career growth or community, the CCLN is here for you.

We’re more than a network; we’re a movement shaping the future of clinical coding.

To get involved please contact: email addresses to be confirmed

Description:
Vakamo is the Iceberg governance company – starting with Lakekeeper, the open-source Apache Iceberg catalog for the modern Lakehouse.

Modern data teams need more than just storage. They need control.
Lakekeeper gives you a fast, flexible, and fully open Apache Iceberg catalog – REST-native, self-hostable, and ready for production.

We built it because existing solutions are too closed, too heavy, or too expensive.
With Lakekeeper, you get the foundation to build your Lakehouse your way – no lock-in, no nonsense.

And we’re just getting started.

Vakamo is building the Lakehouse control plane for Apache Iceberg:
	•	Table maintenance and smart compaction to keep performance high and costs low
	•	Computational governance to manage how, where, and by whom workloads are executed
	•	Data contracts to define clear expectations between data producers and consumers, enforced directly at the catalog layer

We believe governance shouldn’t slow you down – it should be built into your stack, programmable, and aligned with how modern teams work. Just clear rules, embedded into your platform.

Vakamo is open for design partnerships.
If you’re building data products at scale and want to shape the future of Lakehouse governance, let’s build together.

Macardy Analytics' expertise encompasses Power BI dashboard creation, automation solutions via Power Automate, custom Robotic Process Automation with Python, pipeline creation with Azure Cloud Services, and bespoke Machine Learning solutions. Noteworthy is the founder, Cian McCarthy, who has been recognised with several awards for his innovative Power BI solutions at Dell Technologies. The firm's work has notably saved its retail clients up to five hours per week through automation and Power BI solutions, underscoring its commitment to efficiency and excellence.

What we stand for:
We aim to bring transparency to the chaos of marketing effectiveness. The market is flooded with quick, fragmented solutions that often present a false truth. We stand for 'one single source of truth', where we combine multiple solutions into one truth on which marketing decisions can be based.

The problem we solve:
Companies spend a lot of budget on marketing without really knowing what it delivers. Big decisions are based on the last click before purchase or figures from the major marketing channels themselves. This results in a far from optimal allocation of the marketing budget.

Our approach:
We combine marketing experiments with multiple data science solutions, such as Marketing Mix Modelling, Multi-Touch Attribution, and Causality Analysis. With our experience at Coolblue and My Jewellery, we can bridge the gap between complex data solutions and marketing business. Incrementality and Attribution are our magic words.

Magpie Technology provides tools with results of marketing effectiveness. This way, you can cut out ineffective marketing and further invest in marketing channels with potential.

Description:
The Mediterranean Growth Initiative (MGI) is an independent, private sector undertaking supporting thinking and doing around the Mediterranean.

The MGI rests on two key pillars: understanding the region and its potential using data and analysis, and bringing together key decision-makers and investors.

We published our inaugural report in 2015, and since then we have covered key issues facing the Med on our Twitter account, as well as in ad hoc analysis pieces.

MGI.online the Mediterranean Growth Initiative’s web portal, launched in April 2017. It is the one-stop hub for information on the Mediterranean, providing direct access to data and analysis covering all countries in the region.

A Unique Proposition
Regional lens: Mgi.online is the only data and analysis platform focusing on the Mediterranean as a region. Data based evidence is critical to governance, policy making and investment decisions giving context to opportunity and risk. To offer a regional lens, data is uniquely aggregated using cutting edge methodologies.

Methodology: We use cutting edge techniques, combining human and artificial intelligence, to develop agenda-free analysis offered to mgi.online users.

Proprietary: Our proprietary Mediterranean Economic Prospects Index (MEPI) provides a benchmarking tool combining complex information into a single index gauging the economic prospects of the different countries of the Med.

Endorsements & Networks: Endorsed by the World Bank in our MoU with the Center for Mediterranean Integration; collaboration with ELIAMEP, Greece’s pre-eminent think tank with EU and international orientation; contributor to Bloomberg’s survey of professional forecasters.

Our niche expertise is premised on our long experience in advising governments on measuring and forecasting policy impact and outcomes; working with corporations on market entry strategies and evidence based decision making; an in depth understanding of governance in defining risk at board level.

Essentiel à la coopération transfrontalière entre la France, l’Allemagne, et la Suisse, il permet de collecter, d’assembler, d’harmoniser et de diffuser en Open Data des données thématiques diverses sur le bassin rhénan.

 A partir de ces informations, GeoRhena produit des cartes statiques au format PDF et des cartes interactives grâce à un Géoportail. C’est ainsi que sont mis en évidence les points communs et les différences entre les trois pays composant le Rhin Supérieur, de même que la diversité de l’espace transfrontalier.

Name: Data-Coop Culture
Description:
La Data-Coop Culture est une plateforme collaborative innovante dédiée au marketing numérique dans le secteur culturel. 

Cette initiative vise à fournir aux organisations culturelles des alternatives aux géants du web (GAFAM) pour la gestion et l'exploitation de leurs données.

Depuis son lancement en 2022, la Data-Coop Culture a déployé le Pixel Culture au sein de plus de 150 d’organisations, pour collecter leurs données de navigation de manière indépendante, tout en respectant des lois internationales sur la protection des renseignements personnels (Loi 25 / RGPD / CPRA / etc.). 

Cette mutualisation des données a permis de créer près de 10 millions de profils culturels à ce jour, offrant ainsi aux membres l'accès à des audiences mutualisées de grande qualité pour réaliser leurs campagnes de marketing numérique.

En 2024, la Data-Coop Culture a reçu un soutien financier significatif du Ministère de la Culture et des Communications du Québec, confirmant son rôle stratégique dans le marketing numérique du secteur culturel. 

Ce financement contribue à la mise en place d'une plateforme libre-service de mesure et d'activation des campagnes publicitaires, visant à  faciliter la gestion du marketing numérique pour les organisations culturelles. Il fait suite aux soutiens reçus précédemment de la Ville de Montréal et du Gouvernement du Canada.

Data-Coop Culture se distingue par son modèle coopératif, où les membres restent propriétaires de leurs données. Les données et les audiences ne sont pas commercialisées à des tiers et sont à l'usage unique des membres de la Data-Coop. 

La plateforme met également un accent sur le soutien aux médias locaux grâce à des outils publicitaires programmatiques indépendants des GAFAM.

Nos valeurs :
- Souveraineté des données
- Soutien aux médias locaux
- Collaboration et mutualisation des ressources
- Innovation technologique

When you start making your traffic data work for you, your sales team will close more sales, your stores will run more efficiently, and your marketing will keep customers coming back for decades.


The doorcounts retail sales cloud is the brainchild  of the company’s founder, Brad Parker. With 28 years in the furniture business, Brad has experienced every kind of market and, not only has he survived to talk about it, but today he has 7 thriving stores that count on doorcounts. 


After applying lean management systems to every area of his furniture business, Brad and his team realized the industry needed a smarter way to maximize retail sales. Brad’s obsession with lean management practices is a testament to the quality of doorcounts and why no other traffic counter even comes close to what doorcounts can do for your business. 

 
Years of trial-and-error bootstrapping has made doorcounts the surest way to maximize profitability of every store by transforming essential traffic data into useful information that delivers the best shopping experience at every opportunity and beyond.


The result for Brad’s furniture business is a dramatic increase in store sales. In fact, a recent enhancement produced a 50 percent increase in sales during a monthly event comparing November to December 2018. (If you are in the furniture business, you know that November is typically the best month of the year and December is one of the slowest.)

Name: CHEMID
Description:
ChemID: The Future of Chemical Data Integrity & Track-and-Trace

ChemID is a global leader in chemical data management and regulatory intelligence, solving one of the biggest oversight gaps: verifiable, standardized chemical traceability from the lab to the marketplace.

Unlike generic inventory systems, ChemID begins where compliance starts — at the analytical laboratory. Our platform ingests, normalizes, and secures testing results into a tamper-proof blockchain ledger. Each batch is tied to real-time package labeling (QR/Hash codes), ensuring regulators, businesses, and consumers maintain a direct line of sight across the full lifecycle of controlled substances and other regulated products.

Applications span benefit potential to multiple high-stakes sectors:
• Controlled substances & pharmaceuticals (DEA, FDA, EMA)
• Petrochemicals & industrial inputs (EPA, OSHA)
• Food & water safety (USDA, FDA, WHO)
• Security & defense supply chains (DoD, NATO, USAID)
• Law enforcement (DEA, FBI, evidentiary chain-of-custody)
• Global import/export verification (CBP, WTO, CAFTA-DR, EU trade)

Key Benefits:
• Audit-Ready Compliance: Standardized, regulator-grade COAs in real time.
• Transparency & Security: Blockchain data prevents tampering or counterfeiting.
• Interoperability: Universal ETL tools unify CSV, XML, PDF into a standard schema.
• Rapid Response: Real-time audit dashboards and recall functionality.
• Global Trade Confidence: Seamless cross-border verification.

ChemID has partnered with SICPA (www.sicpa.com), the global leader in tax stamps and secure packaging, to merge chemical integrity with supply chain authenticity.

With ChemID, regulators gain real-time oversight, businesses gain market trust and efficiency, and consumers gain safety and confidence.

www.ChemID.com — redefining compliance, safety, and trust in the world’s most regulated markets.

Nuestro trabajo no es sólo capturar información; es entenderla, filtrarla y comunicarla mediante modelos tridimensionales que permitan comprender el territorio o entorno de trabajo para la toma de decisiones informadas, ya sea para optimizar la operación de una planta industrial, mejorar la logística en una bodega, planificar políticas en proyectos gubernamentales, conducir investigaciones en el sector académico o planear el manejo de recursos naturales.

Ofrecemos estudios de Geointeligencia personalizados, que permiten a nuestros clientes transformar realidades y potenciar economías, capitalizando nuevas oportunidades del lugar donde se encuentran.

Nuestra misión es realizar estudios que permitan entender el territorio, para transformar realidades.

Name: Risk Data Analytics, Inc.
Description:
Risk Data Analytics, Inc. is at the forefront of transforming safety and risk management in the construction and crane industries through innovative mobile applications and AI technology. Our mission is to empower workers and companies with tools that enhance efficiency, safety, and decision-making.

Our flagship product, Certlok, available on Apple and Play Stores, enables workers such as linemen, welders, riggers, and operators to seamlessly manage and share their credentials and certifications with employers and unions. This streamlined approach ensures compliance and fosters trust across the industry.

Building on this foundation, Certlok SOS, offered on a contractual basis to crane companies, provides real-time incident alerts to companies, insurers, legal and forensic teams,  capturing critical data before it disappears. Equipped with advanced risk management tools, Certlok SOS is redefining safety standards in construction by enabling proactive responses to on-site challenges.

In parallel, our groundbreaking LiftAlert technology propels crane operations into an era of real-time accident prevention. Integrated with Certlok SOS, LiftAlert powers a global data platform that transmits, stores, and analyzes crane operation data. Using AI to analyze real-time data against a large proprietary set of crane forensic accident data LiftAlert predictings potential risks and alerts operators and safety personnel, it helps avert accidents before they occur.

Together, these solutions are driving a new era of risk management and insurance evaluation, setting a transformative standard for the construction and crane industries.

For postgraduate and PhD scholars, we provide comprehensive research support—from topic selection and literature reviews to data analysis, formatting, and journal publication assistance. For corporates, our market research services deliver consumer insights, competitor benchmarks, and demand forecasts backed by statistical rigor. Our certifications in Data Analytics, Mathematics, and Statistics blend theory, case studies, and real-world datasets, preparing learners for academic success and professional growth.

SODA operates globally, delivering solutions across India, Asia, the Middle East, Europe, and North America. Our unique approach—Understand → Analyze → Apply → Deliver → Support—ensures every project is personalized, scalable, and impactful. With a strong commitment to ethics, quality, and innovation, we aim to build a ₹100 crore ecosystem within the next five years.

Name: Amnis
Description:
There is a glitch in the human brain called inattentional blindness.

When staff perform repetitive tasks, like dispensing medication, biology takes over. We stop seeing reality and start seeing expectations. The result? For every 1 error caught, 8 are missed.

Enter Amnis.

We transform pharmacy safety by bringing AI Agent Supervision to physical work. We don't just log mistakes; we prevent them in real-time.

Amnis makes any camera part of your workforce. From a high-res camera above the counter to smart glasses, our AI reads the medication name, dosage, and label, verifying it against the active prescription instantly.

The Override: We catch the "invisible" errors that humans miss.

Zero Friction: No scanning. No disruption. Your hands stay free.

Intelligence: Deep insights into near-misses, bottlenecks, and staff performance.

We see the 89% you are missing.

What We Do:
We build next-generation retrieval infrastructure for AI applications that demand relevance beyond simple vector similarity. Our platform combines multi-modal search capabilities (BM25, HNSW dense vectors, SPLADE embeddings, metadata-rich sparse vectors) with enterprise-grade features to deliver retrieval systems that understand user intent and real-world complexity.

Key Highlights:
60-120% reduction in compute requirements while improving retrieval quality by 20-50%
Up to 20× higher query throughput than traditional search solutions
Unified architecture with colocated storage no external databases needed
Immutable, versioned architecture with time-travel capabilities
Apache 2.0 licensed with complete source access

Our Mission:

We optimize for user satisfaction, not just mathematical similarity incorporating multiple signals and contextual factors to surface truly useful results.

Name: DS4M Mediterráneo
Description:
ITS DS4M Mediterráneo (Data Space for Mobility) es una iniciativa impulsada por el Ministerio para la Transformación Digital y de la Función Pública, con financiación de los fondos europeos Next Generation EU, en el marco del Plan de Impulso de los Espacios de Datos Sectoriales.

El proyecto está liderado por el Instituto Universitario de Investigación en Tráfico y Seguridad Vial (INTRAS) de la Universitat de València, y cuenta con la colaboración de otros centros de referencia de la misma universidad, como el Instituto de Robótica y Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones (IRTIC). Además, recibe el respaldo de entidades clave en el ámbito de la movilidad, como la asociación de Sistemas Inteligentes y de Transporte (ITS España).

El objetivo principal del proyecto es desarrollar una plataforma de datos de movilidad en el Corredor Mediterráneo que permita:
1. Mejorar la movilidad más sostenible
2. Incentivar la autonomía digital estratégica y la calidad del dato

El propósito de este proyecto es convertirse en un "centro demostrador"; es decir, en un entorno tecnológico que permita probar, validar y simular modelos de negocio basados en el uso compartido de datos a través de "casos de uso", como los Planes de Movilidad Urbana Sostenible (PMUS), los Planes de Movilidad Metropolitanos (PMoMes), los Planes Regionales Estratégicos y la implantación de Zonas de Bajas Emisiones (ZBE).

Para hacerlo posible, será necesaria la colaboración de todos, administraciones y empresas tanto públicas o privadas; para contribuir a la mejora de la movilidad y en última instancia a la mejora de vida de los ciudadanos.

Name: OLTER - Robotics and Autonomous Systems
Description:
Funded as part of the Scottish Government's Energy Transition Fund, the OLTER project aims to deliver a Robotics and Autonomous Systems (RAS) Industrial Service in Scotland which supports the Offshore Energy Industry and Supply Chain to scale and commercialise robotics as a service.

The 36-month project consists of two phases - phase 1 and 2 will focus on development of Industry Standards in robotic vehicle design, operation and communication under a “Competency Hub”, whilst also establishing a “Data Hub” operating under formal Data Governance Agreements with a preliminary Tech Stack architecture on which to collect data and grow Machine Learning capability. Future phases will cover establishing an Industrial Centre with physical testing and services. 

OLTER is funded by Scottish Government, Net Zero Technology Centre, National Robotarium and Offshore Renewable Energy Catapult, and supported by a number of partners.

Name: Flypower
Description:
Across complex infrastructure projects, high cancellation rates and crippling delays are common, leading to sunk costs of $2M-$4M per site and stalling essential development. The top cause of failure is escalating community opposition and permitting gridlock.

Flypower was founded by experts from high-stakes environments like national security and crisis management, where detecting and preempting threat narratives and public instability was crucial. We've applied this same intelligence-grade AI to de-risk development, beginning with renewable energy and expanding to data centers.

Our platform provides the deep intelligence needed for the entire project lifecycle, from site selection through permitting. We transform the overwhelming volume of public data—social media, government meetings, zoning cases—into actionable intelligence. This allows you to predict community risks, identify cooperative jurisdictions, and guide proactive engagement, ensuring your teams are deployed with maximum effect. We enable companies to kill bad projects sooner, minimizing millions in wasted early-stage spend.

Our platform focuses on the two most critical areas that cause permit delays and/or rejections:

Community & Stakeholder Risk: We provide stakeholder mapping and sentiment analysis to help you identify and successfully engage a cooperative and friendly jurisdiction. Our goal is to ensure you make data-driven decisions on entering new markets and avoid the costly complications that arise from misreading local priorities.

Past Project Intelligence: We analyze historical project data and regulatory outcomes within the jurisdiction to streamline your permitting process. Our platform provides a comprehensive analysis of the AHJ authorities, offering detailed insights into zoning, permit approvals and rejections, along with any changes being considered on the regulatory front.

Let's discuss how Flypower can turn uncertainty into a competitive advantage for your next project.

Name: Syntra Analytics
Description:
At Syntra Analytics, we help small to mid-sized businesses stop drowning in disconnected, messy data, and start making smart decisions with AI-ready systems.

Because here’s the truth: AI can’t fix broken data. It just magnifies the chaos.
We make sure your data is clean, structured, and actually useful—so you’re not stuck second-guessing dashboards, chasing spreadsheets, or paying for tools that don’t talk to each other.

Here’s how we help:
We assess your data (How are you collecting it? Where does it live? Who owns it?).
We cleanse and organize your data + metadata (less chaos, more clarity).
We migrate it from too-many tools into streamlined systems (hello, cost savings).
We integrate your systems so your team stops swivel-chairing between apps.

No complicated jargon. No magic AI promises. Just smart, thoughtful data strategy that helps you stop guessing and start scaling.

We believe your data isn’t broken, it’s just been unsupervised too long.

No AI?  We do that, too.  Your business runs smoother when things are organized.

Curious where your data stands?
Let’s take a look. If you're successful, we're successful.

Name: Logarithm Labs | The Data Usability Company
Description:
As per Gartner, only 20% of analytics initiatives drive business outcomes. Despite all the investments that are made in data processing infrastructure:

- Decision makers don’t have accurate reports and dashboards
- Analysts and data scientists can’t access the data they need
- Data engineers are constantly firefighting to resolve escalations 

This is because data from sources (eg: ERP systems, customer-facing systems, spreadsheets etc) is not easily accessible by analysts. Several tools exist, but in-house expertise to stitch them together reliably is lacking, and expensive to acquire.

Logarithm Labs provides Data Engineering as a Service; where we stand up and operate custom data infrastructure - so analysts have fresh, accurate data accessed easily via a catalog, enabling them to produce impactful reports for management - at a fraction of the cost and time to do this in-house.

How we help data teams:
We take requirements from your data engineering/ architecture teams and tailor pipelines to fit your needs. This includes connecting to data sources, extraction, cleansing, joining, transforms, automation, etc. to create the metric tables that can be accessed via your tools of choice. 

To learn more, contact us at hello@logarithmlabs.com.

Name: Nordic Numbers
Description:
We are a data analytics consulting company from Norway, specializing in the data toolbox of tomorrow.

Feed your machine learning model a wealth of variables, and it might generate impressive predictions. But when the data environment shifts—a common challenge in energy, finance, or consumer behavior—prediction quality declines. Even in stable settings, conventional methods often tell you 𝘸𝘩𝘢𝘵 might happen but not 𝘸𝘩𝘺.

That’s where our expertise in state-of-the-art causal reasoning models shines. We help you understand 𝘸𝘩𝘺 outcomes occur, enabling you to purposefully replicate and induce the results you desire, leading to intelligent and achievable strategies.

You make better decisions when you understand!

Name: Lambda - Lund Data Science Society
Description:
Hey!
Are you interested in data science, analysis and/or visualization? Would you like to learn more about all the things you could do with data, or do you want to share what you have already learned? Then Lambda might be the organization for you!

Lambda is a student-led, data-focused organization at Lund University, which basically means that we love all things data. We're big believers in hands-on learning, which is why we offer workshops and events that cover everything from programming to data visualization to machine learning. It doesn't matter if you're new to data science or a seasoned pro - there's always something new. We regularly have projects, not seldom in collaboration with companies, that enable our members apply what they have learned on real-life data to show off their skills and expand their project portfolios.

If any of this sounds interesting to you, feel free to come to our next meeting or simply join our Slack to keep tabs on what’s going on.

Join us and be a part of this exciting journey!
Oh, and there are no membership fees.

Description:
We are Cyscode Technology, the architects of the digital future for the healthcare industry. Our mission is to build the foundational infrastructure—the computational power, robust data architecture, and impenetrable secure networks—that a world-class health system demands. We believe this work isn't just a service; it is our contribution to a legacy of medical innovation.

The Foundation of Our Innovation
We operate on a simple, yet powerful, principle: to solve real-world problems. This ethos has led us to create two historical platforms that have fundamentally reshaped the regional healthcare landscape.

DataPulse
Before we introduced DataPulse, the process of extracting meaningful insights from complex JAWDA KPI datasets was a manual, cumbersome, and error-prone task. We engineered a solution that transforms this raw data into precise, actionable intelligence, providing healthcare quality teams with unprecedented clarity, speed, and accuracy at scale. This platform wasn't built on existing models; it was forged from a deep understanding of the challenges our clients faced.

Clinicost Engine - Full-Stack Clinical Costing
We recognized that preparing clinical costing submissions for the DOH was a fragmented process lacking transparency. CliniCost Engine was our answer. It gives executives a complete, accurate, and auditable view of all their data in one place, eliminating the complexity and potential for error and allowing for seamless compliance.

At Purple Slingshot, we ignite the potential within mid-career software professionals, empowering them to redefine their paths and achieve new pinnacles of success. 

The essence of our brand, represented by the color purple, mirrors qualities of creativity, ambition, and the richness of untapped potential waiting to be discovered.

We understand that the journey of career transformation is deeply personal and unique. Thus, our approach is not just about imparting knowledge but about inspiring a resurgence of passion, curiosity, and the aspiration to reach for the stars. 

Purple Slingshot is a testament to the belief that it's never too late to chase your dreams or pivot towards a future brimming with possibilities.

Join us, and let Purple Slingshot be your ally in this journey of self-discovery and professional reinvention, where every challenge is an opportunity, and every aspiration is within reach.

We exist to help organizations unlock the full potential of their data. In today’s dynamic landscape, data is no longer just an asset — it’s a strategic lever. Yet many teams are held back by fragmented systems, slow insights, and legacy complexity. At DataEngite, our mission is to bridge that gap, transforming how data powers decision-making, performance, and innovation.

How We Work

Like a strategy consulting firm for data, we don’t push products — we partner deeply with clients to align data strategy with business goals. Our work starts by understanding the client’s ecosystem, then engineering solutions that enhance, not replace, existing investments. We bring clarity to complexity by designing scalable architectures, integrating across platforms, and enabling real-time intelligence.

Whether advising CIOs on cloud modernization, helping utilities operationalize SCADA data, or enabling cross-functional visibility through unified dashboards, our role is to guide, architect, and deliver systems that make data actionable and trusted.

What We Deliver

We provide end-to-end data consulting and engineering services, including:
	•	Data strategy & architecture advisory
	•	Systems integration & infrastructure optimization
	•	Real-time analytics & reporting enablement
	•	AI/ML readiness and automation frameworks
	•	Governance, scalability, and performance tuning

DataEngite empowers clients to lead with data, not just manage it.

Our name, DUCK, is a declaration of our difference. We do not quack loudly to announce our presence; our work speaks for us. It speaks in the language of growth, of intelligence, of the confidence that comes from knowing.

We are the navigators of the unknown, the cartographers of the uncharted. We do not shy away from the unexplored, for it is there that opportunity lies. We embrace the challenge, the adventure, the thrill of discovery.

Our clients are our flock, and we lead them not into the safety of the known, but into the exhilarating uncertainty of potential. With DUCK, companies do not just grow; they evolve, they transform, they soar.

In a world full of chickens, be a duck.


We believe in the power of knowledge, not as a static pool to gaze upon, but as a dynamic river that flows, connects, and gives life to ideas. To take action.

Description:

Durch die Entwicklung Bayesianischer Datenmodelle unterstützen wir Unternehmen und Forschungseinrichtungen das in ihren Daten vorhandene Potenzial auszuschöpfen. PyData provides a forum for the international community of users and developers of data analysis tools to share ideas and learn from each other. The global PyData network promotes discussion of best practices, new approaches, and emerging technologies for data management, processing, analytics, and visualization. PyData communities approach data science using many languages, including (but not limited to) Python, Julia, and R.

The PyData Code of Conduct (http://pydata.org/code-of-conduct.html)governsgoverns) this meetup. To discuss any issues or concerns relating to the code of conduct or the behavior of anyone at a PyData meetup, please contact NumFOCUS Executive Director Leah Silen (+1 512-222-5449; leah@numfocus.org ) or the group organizer.

AGENS wirkt darauf hin, den Zugang zu Sekundärdaten zu erleichtern und damit deren Nutzung für wissenschaftliche Forschung zu verbessern. Ein ganz wesentlicher Aspekt für das Engagement von AGENS sind dabei von jeher der Datenzugang und die Datenaufbereitung als essentielle Voraussetzungen jeder nachfolgenden Datenanalyse. Dabei wirkt AGENS auch bei Politikberatung mit, z. B. bei der Novellierung des § 303f SGB V oder der Ausgestaltung des im Digitale-Versorgung-Gesetz (DVG) angelegte Forschungsdatenzentrums. Wichtig dabei ist die Beachtung datenschutzrechtlicher Belange bei gleichzeitiger Förderung der (Versorgungs-)Forschung.

AGENS stellt ein offenes Forum für alle Interessenten an Sekundärdatenanalysen dar. Der Informationsaustausch erfolgt über den stetig wachsenden Email-Verteiler, am Rande eigener Veranstaltungen und in speziellen Sessions auf den Jahrestagungen der Muttergesellschaften.

Prodotto di punta: Aivia
Aivia è una piattaforma SaaS progettata per raccogliere, analizzare e correlare enormi quantità di dati provenienti da sensori, videocamere e API esterne. Non è una semplice dashboard, ma un sistema completo, configurabile e potenziato da AI, che permette di visualizzare e interpretare i dati con facilità.

Cosa Rende Aivia Unica?

Dashboard Personalizzabile: Aivia consente agli utenti di creare una visualizzazione personalizzata con widget per adattarsi a ogni esigenza specifica.
Analisi Predittiva e Storica: La piattaforma permette di anticipare problemi e migliorare l’efficienza grazie a previsioni basate su dati storici.
Chatbot Avanzato: Integrando l’AI di OpenAI, il chatbot di Aivia risponde a domande in linguaggio naturale, rendendo l'interpretazione dei dati più semplice e accessibile.
Mercati di Riferimento
Ci rivolgiamo a settori come Smart Cities, Industria, Centri Commerciali e Comprensori Sciistici. La nostra piattaforma aiuta a migliorare la gestione delle infrastrutture, ottimizzare le operazioni e garantire la sicurezza in questi ambienti.

Perché Geniai?
In un mondo sempre più guidato dai dati, Geniai punta a diventare un partner di riferimento per chi cerca soluzioni innovative per la gestione e l'analisi dei dati. Crediamo nell'uso strategico e accessibile dei dati per creare vantaggi competitivi e favorire l’innovazione.

 Seguiteci per scoprire come l'intelligenza artificiale sta trasformando la gestione dei dati nei contesti più dinamici!

Name: Vertical

O cliente DEVE estar no centro de todas as decisões. Cliente, paciente, filiado, cooperado, não importa. A visão e todas as decisões de uma empresa, precisam estar direcionadas a quem efetivamente compra o seu produto ou serviço. 
Isso parece básico, mas na prática não é assim que funciona em muitos ambientes profissionais. Seja pela pressa das decisões, seja pelas equipes cada vez mais enxutas, ou porque as informações não estão claras e a disposição da liderança, o fato é que muitas organizações promovem ações e campanhas baseadas na percepção do líder, do gestor, da equipe. 
É aqui que a Vertical entra e fica muito a vontade. Nossa especialidade é conectar a sua marca com as percepções do seu cliente, alinhando seus objetivos de negócio com as necessidades e desejos do consumidor, te ajudando a desenvolver planos de ação que te façam aumentar faturamento, margens e obviamente a satisfação e lealdade do seu cliente. 
Você sabe o que o seu cliente pensa sobre a sua marca e seus serviços? A sua equipe de vendas, operação, sabe como a sua empresa quer ser percebida pelo consumidor? As suas decisões comerciais e de marketing, estão baseadas em dados?
A gente sabe o quanto isso pode ser difícil no dia a dia. Sabemos também que independente do momento que a sua empresa esteja vivendo, uma coisa é certa: o consumidor precisa estar no centro das suas decisões. 
Conheça a Vertical !

Name: PrecisOne
Description:
PrecisOne is a legal-grade salary intelligence platform. We capture full employer job postings as they appear in the market and preserve them as time-stamped, verifiable records. From that preserved source of truth, we structure the data and deliver defensible insight for compliance, litigation, investigations, and strategic workforce decisions across the U.S. and other jurisdictions.

Organizations use PrecisOne to move from guesswork to evidence. Every record is attributable to a named company and role, which allows counsel, GCs, and compensation leaders to see how jobs are defined, how ranges move, and where practices create exposure.

What we deliver
• Market analysis at the company and job level to compare roles and ranges by peers, region, and time
• Auditor checks that review postings for legal requirements and create a clear compliance trail
• Risk reports that surface patterns tied to pay exposure before complaints or claims arise
• A job-description and posting library with verified ranges for rapid discovery and diligence
• Alerts on competitor and market shifts that matter to counsel and comp leaders
• Litigation and investigations support with preserved, source-linked records suitable for review
• M&A and due-diligence datasets that highlight compensation risk before a deal closes

Why it matters
• Only preserved record of what employers publicly state jobs should pay
• Structured and verifiable evidence that reduces time to insight and improves defensibility
• A scalable system of record that supports compliance, audits, negotiations, and strategic planning

Buyers and users: General Counsel and legal teams, employment law firms, compensation leaders, and executives responsible for compliance and risk.

Quantitative Models:
Multi-factor analysis: valuation, momentum, quality, and growth.
Proprietary algorithms: ATR compression, EMA crossovers, and statistical arbitrage.
Macro-quant models: linking macro indicators to sectoral trends.

Scuttlebutt Research:
On-ground surveys, channel checks, and networking for unique insights.
Grassroots feedback, especially for SMEs and microcaps.

Behavioral Analysis:
Tracking market sentiment and insider activity.

Deep-Dive Financial Analysis:
Analyzing reports, benchmarking, and cash flow.

Macro and Sectoral Insights:
Evaluating global and cross-sector trends.

Alternative Data Sources:
Satellite imagery, social media sentiment via NLP, and web scraping.

By blending quantitative rigor with traditional insights.

Financial Services

Technology.

Name: UMD-LinkUp AI Maps
Description:
UMD-LinkUp AI Maps is the world’s first attempt to map the creation of AI jobs. To date, the handful of research papers in academia and industry have used keywords to identify which jobs require AI skills and which do not. Our analysis indicates that this is an extremely flawed approach, with up to 70% false positives. In contrast, we use a fine-tuned large language model (LLM), powered by cutting-edge AI technologies, to differentiate jobs requiring AI skills from others. In short, we use AI to do research on AI.

Maryland Smith
The Robert H. Smith School of Business is a global leader in management education and research. One of 12 colleges and schools at the University of Maryland at College Park, the school offers undergraduate, MS, MBA, PhD, and executive education programs. Several of the school's departments rank among the top 10 in the world for research in their respective fields.

LinkUp
LinkUp combines more than 20 years of experience in human capital management and employment data with proprietary technology that indexes millions of job listings daily directly from employer websites around the world. From this unique jobs dataset, LinkUp provides clients with actionable insights into the global labor market at the macroeconomic to individual company level or across themes, skills, products, and technologies.

Name: Xplore Intelligence
Description:
Xplore Intelligence helps risk, operations, and business development teams in regulated enterprises make faster, defensible decisions.

In areas like border security, clinical trials, business intelligence, and investigations, teams must decide whether to approve, block, reroute, or escalate — but data about the same organisations, people, assets, and events is scattered and often contradictory. Today, analysts spend weeks manually stitching together records from internal systems and open sources to justify a single decision. Mistakes can mean missed risks, operational delays, or regulatory exposure.

Xplore solves this by keeping an always-current, auditable view of each real-world object. Our core engine, Node Resolution, continuously merges fragmented references into a single entity graph, links every fact to its source, and updates the object as new information arrives.

This creates a living Digital Twin for each decision object, so teams can monitor only meaningful changes — ownership shifts, incidents, sanctions signals, shipment delays, or new business opportunities — and act immediately with full traceability. Customers use Xplore to cut weeks of manual research to hours, reduce false positives in screening, and defend decisions under audit — where one wrong call can cost millions and AI must be accountable.

IP
UK priority filing secured (10 September 2025) — patent pending on graph-centred multi-agent orchestration for explainable AI.

Technical overview available on request.

Name: EFFORT
Description:
Formålet med EFFORT er at øge energieffektiviteten på Hirtshals Havn gennem datadrevne analyser af den nuværende energiproduktion og -forbrug. Projektet vil skabe grundlag for udarbejdelsen af retningslinjer og styringsmetoder for den fremtidige udbygning af havnen, hvor energifleksibilitet, sektorkobling og digitalisering er nøgleord. Visionen er at industrier og havne kan bruge projektets guidelines og roadmaps til at etablere mere bæredygtige energiløsninger i fremtiden. 

Projektets partnere:
- Aalborg Universitet, AAU Energi
- Greenport North P/S
- Hirtshals Havn
- Teknologisk Institut
- CenterDanmark Fonden
- Nord Energi Net A/S
- Centrica Energy Trading A/S
- PlanEnergi 
- EMD International A/S

Bevilling:
Projektet støttes af ELFORSK, som er en offentligt finansieret pulje på 25 mio., der administreres af Green Power Danmark. ELFORSK støtter innovations- og forskningsprojekter, der fremmer energieffektivisering og fleksibilitetsløsninger via dataanalyse, digitalisering og sektorkobling på tværs af eksempelvis el, fjernvarme og transport. EFFORT støttes med 8 mio. kr., hvilket er den største bevilling givet til et enkelt projekt fra ELFORSK-puljen. 

Hjemmeside: https://www.energy.aau.dk/research/project-websites/effort-project

Name: Comunità Italiana Data Steward (CIDS)
Description:
Il data steward è un professionista dei dati della ricerca: nel suo ruolo supporta i ricercatori nella gestione attenta e responsabile dei dati (e in generale di tutti i prodotti) della ricerca durante il loro ciclo di vita, ossia dalla pianificazione alla condivisione con il pubblico nell’ottica di realizzare una scienza sempre più aperta e trasparente.

Siamo una Comunità nata dal basso con il supporto del Centro di Competenza ICDI e del progetto europeo Skills4EOSC, con l’esigenza di collaborare per aiutarci a vicenda nel costruire nuove competenze spesso non direttamente accessibili nei percorsi di formazione tradizionale; collaborare per favorire la convergenza su soluzioni condivise alla gestione dei dati della ricerca e aumentare la consapevolezza e la conoscenza del ruolo del Data Steward all’interno e all’esterno delle Istituzioni di ricerca.

La costruzione della Comunità è un lavoro in divenire, proprio perché lo facciamo in modo partecipativo. Comunichiamo attraverso una mailing list (attualmente più di 100 iscritti) per annunciare e promuovere eventi, confrontarci con i colleghi e attivare collaborazioni.

Name: vyvr
Description:
vyvr restores lost marketing signals for brands navigating platform restrictions, consent rules, and cookie loss.

vyvr is the privacy-first data partner for marketers who need their stack firing, even as Meta, GA4, and ESPs lose visibility into high-intent behavior.

We help marketing, engineering, and legal teams work together by capturing compliant, first-party events at the source, enforcing consent, and streaming clean, usable data back to the tools that drive performance. No rip-and-replace. No shared SaaS.

We offer three core services:

Data Layer: We deploy a first-party data layer directly inside your cloud/site environment. Every event is captured in real time, obfuscated/cleaned, and streamed server-side to Meta, GA4, ESPs, your CRM, and more. You recover the behavioral signals you’ve been missing, while keeping control and compliance intact.

Consent Enforcement: Our data layer enforces consent at the point of capture and strips restricted attributes before they leave your environment. You stay aligned with platform rules, privacy laws, and internal policy, without slowing down marketing.

Data Enablement: With signals/data restored, we help teams turn them into growth assets...compliant CAPI feeds, server-verified segments, strong website experience, personalization, and analytics that actually reflect reality.

vyvr is built for brands where privacy isn’t optional and growth can’t slow down.

Whether you’re losing attribution in GA4, rejected by Meta’s CAPI, or missing lifecycle triggers in your ESP, vyvr puts your data back to work safely.

Name: Onix – Open Nature Intelligence Exchange
Description:
Onix – Open Nature Intelligence Exchange is a global, open, and pre-competitive digital infrastructure designed to make farm and field data discoverable, verifiable, and exchangeable, while placing control and data rights in the hands of farmers. 

Hosted by the World Business Council for Sustainable Development (WBCSD), Onix bridges the trust, coordination, and incentive gaps that hinder data-sharing across the agricultural value chain. It enables a “digital harvest”, unlocking the potential of field-level data to power regenerative farming, inclusive finance, and transparent sourcing.

At the heart of the Onix ecosystem is the Global Field ID (GFID): a unique, persistent identifier for every agricultural field in the world. With 180 million active field Ids in the system covering 700 million hectares of land globally, GFID acts as a common language across platforms and stakeholders, enabling seamless data interoperability. Onix is the infrastructure that connects farmers, input providers, processors, traders, retailers, financial institutions and the market. 

Together, we are accelerating value chain transparency, enabling a data-driven transition to sustainable and resilient food systems.

Contact us: onix@wbcsd.org 

 Join the movement. Advocate. Adopt. Activate.

WHO NEEDS PLATFORM 3:
Mid- to large-sized businesses that grew (and continue to grow) through M&A, are well-established and have multiple locations and business units spanning geographies - nationally and globally. They have significant technology debt from legacy applications and systems.

WHY PLATFORM 3 IS A PREFERRED PARTNER:
Platform 3 offers a full suite of integrated solutions with proprietary products and services, and support to defensibly delete, migrate, archive and retain data to remove expensive and complicated end-of-life technologies. We simplify business operations and mitigate the organization’s risk profile.

Platform 3 Technology Debt Score: We use a proprietary process and technologies to assess an organization’s true technology debt. Technology debt is defined by Platform 3 as the current monetary and opportunity cost tied to existing technology. Technology debt puts the business at risk and contributes to the operational complexities associated with outdated applications, subscriptions, maintenance, processes, compliance and security risks and human capital required to maintain them.

Platform 3 ROI Assessment: Platform 3 converts the technology debt data into a defendable ROI model that demonstrates the true savings that will be delivered through Platform 3 to free up cash to invest in modernization.

Name: PyData Cambridge
Description:
What we're about:

PyData Cambridge is our local PyData meetup chapter.

PyData is an educational program of NumFOCUS, a 501(c)3 non-profit organization in the United States. PyData provides a forum for the international community of users and developers of data analysis tools to share ideas and learn from each other. The global PyData network promotes discussion of best practices, new approaches, and emerging technologies for data management, processing, analytics, and visualization. PyData communities approach data science using many languages, including (but not limited to) Python, Julia, and R.

Slides from past events can be found here: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Fz9G1J6g6yqxTSOFWnp0Kf6m4qXt4-W_?usp=sharing

The PyData Code of Conduct governs this meetup. ( http://pydata.org/code-of-conduct.html ).

PyData is dedicated to providing a harassment-free meeting experience for everyone, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, disability, physical appearance, body size, race, or religion. We do not tolerate harassment of meeting participants in any form.

All communication should be appropriate for a professional audience including people of many different backgrounds. Sexual language and imagery is not appropriate for any conference venue, including talks.
Be kind to others. Do not insult or put down other attendees. Behave professionally. Remember that harassment and sexist, racist, or exclusionary jokes are not appropriate for PyData.

To discuss any issues or concerns relating to the code of conduct or behavior of anyone at the PyData meetup, please contact our CoC Response Team, which consists of the local group organizers and Leonie Mueck (https://twitter.com/LeonieMueck). (You can reach all of through meetup.com). Please also submit a report of any potential Code of Conduct violation directly to NumFOCUS (https://numfocus.typeform.com/to/ynjGdT).

Name: ACM Journal of Data and Information Quality (JDIQ)
Description:
JDIQ's mission is to publish high-quality articles that make a significant and novel contribution to the field of data and information quality. JDIQ welcomes research contributions on the following areas, but not limited to: Information Quality in the Enterprise Context; Database related technical solutions for Information Quality; Information Quality in the context of Computer Science and Information Technology; Information Curation.

JDIQ accepts research conducted using a wide variety of methods ranging from positivists to interpretive methods, systems building descriptions, and database theory, as well as statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, quasi experimental methods, hermeneutics, action research, and case study. JDIQ accepts diverse research methods that are customary in different research backgrounds and traditions, both quantitative and qualitative. Research papers need to demonstrate the use of a rigorous method or methods. Research papers also need to provide valuable and relevant implications for applying their findings and solutions in practice.

a. Questionnaire Development & Validation: Design effective and reliable questionnaires that gather meaningful data, ensuring valid and reliable results.

b. Framework & Methodology Development: Tailored research frameworks and methodologies to structure your research project with clarity and rigor.

c. Data Analysis: Comprehensive data analysis using advanced tools like SPSS, SmartPLS, STATA, and Excel to unlock key insights.

d. Measurement Model & Structural Model: Development and evaluation of measurement and structural models to ensure that your research constructs and relationships are accurately represented.

e. Descriptive & Inferential Statistics: From summarizing data to making predictions, we provide both descriptive and inferential statistical analysis.

f. Hypothesis Testing: Validate your research hypotheses through statistical tests to draw reliable conclusions.

g. Mediation & Moderation: Explore complex relationships and uncover deeper insights by testing mediation and moderation effects.

h. Regression, Correlation, ANOVA, and MANOVA: Conduct advanced statistical tests, including regression, correlation analysis, ANOVA, and MANOVA to analyze and interpret your data.

Why Choose Us?

At Quantura Analytics, we’re committed to delivering results that are not only statistically sound but also actionable. Our goal is to transform complex data into clear, understandable insights that drive informed decision-making. 

Whether you're an academic researcher, a business professional, or someone looking to develop a strong research framework, we are your trusted partner at every step.

Name: Mudder AI
Description:
Our Story

Our journey began when a massive hurricane devastated our community and we witnessed firsthand how disjointed data and systems hampered the emergency response. It became our mission to break down information silos so that resources can reach disaster victims faster and more precisely.

We assembled a team of data scientists, engineers, and emergency management experts obsessed with this goal of optimizing disaster operations through technology. We have partnered closely with experts to develop our integrated disaster management platform.

Our Solution

Our software harnesses AI, real-time data, and optimization algorithms to provide a unified command center for emergency preparation and response. Diverse data streams are ingested into predictive models that generate actionable insights for coordinating personnel, supplies, infrastructure recovery and community support exactly when and where needed most.

Customizable dashboards deliver situational awareness across regions and agencies. Chatbots disseminate public alerts and guidance while managing surges in requests. We use our platform to augment existing emergency systems and workflows. We are leveraging technology to save lives by getting the right resources to the right place at the right time.

Our Vision

At our core we believe every life has equal worth and value. We envision a world where communities are empowered to quickly recover from disasters through cooperation and technology. Our platform plays a humble role in this vision by bringing responders and systems together to serve vulnerable populations effectively and compassionately when the need matters most.

We are just getting started on this journey. As we apply our platform across more disaster scenarios and refine our capabilities, we move one step closer to a society resilient in the face of crisis. We welcome like-minded partners ready to innovate today for a safer tomorrow.

Name: Saddle Point Science Europe
Description:
Saddle Point Science Europe BV is a biomedical data science company. It is the European R&D centre of the Saddle Point Science group. It is dedicated to developing novel mathematical, statistical and computational techniques to address the data analytics challenges of modern medicine, to allow more precise prediction of treatment responders and clinical risk. 

Predicting which patients are most likely to respond to a given treatment has the potential to improve treatment results, lower treatment costs, and lessen side effects for patients. In addition, data analysis methods that require fewer patients would aid the development of new therapies for rare diseases.

Our company addresses the above challenges through research based on novel Bayesian inference and advanced mathematical techniques. We focus on innovation, collaboration, patient-centricity, and continuous learning in addressing these challenges.

We implement our advanced new algorithms in user-friendly industry-standard software, tailored to be used by medical researchers and professionals. Feel free to connect.

• What are the top drivers across categories & functions right now?
• Have our actions really moved these top drivers?
• Is our action plan strong enough to close the gap?
• What’s the ROI - is this really worth it in dollars?

It pulls together data from ERP, MES, quality logs, machine monitoring, and more - one source of truth, so your team can act without second-guessing.


And we don’t buy into the false choice between engaging your people or managing by the numbers. Breakthrough performance needs both. That’s why we work closely with your team to connect what’s in the data with what to do next - and why it matters.
